duas.translation: My Lord, forgive me and accept my repentance, You are the Ever-Relenting, the All-Forgiving.

duas.arabic: رَبِّ اغۡفِرۡ لِیۡ وَ لِاَخِیۡ وَ اَدۡخِلۡنَا فِیۡ رَحۡمَتِکَ وَ اَنۡتَ اَرۡحَمُ الرّٰحِمِیۡنَ
duas.latin: Rabbi ighfir lee wali akhee wa adkhilna fee rahmatika wa anta arhamur rahimeen
duas.translation: O my Lord! Forgive me and my brother, and make us enter into Your Mercy, for you are the Most Merciful of those who show mercy.
duas.benefits: This dua was asked by prophet Musa (AS).

titles.title_name: For asking forgiveness for yourself and anyone who enters your house

duas.arabic: رَبِّ اغۡفِرۡ لِیۡ وَ لِوَالِدَیَّ وَ لِمَنۡ دَخَلَ بَیۡتِیَ مُؤۡمِنًا وَّ لِلۡمُؤۡمِنِیۡنَ وَ الۡمُؤۡمِنٰتِ وَ لَا تَزِدِ الظّٰلِمِیۡنَ اِلَّا تَبَارًا
duas.latin: Rabbi ighfir lee waliwalidayyawaliman dakhala baytiya mu’minan walil mu’mineena wal mu’minati wala tazidi aththalimeena illatabaran
duas.translation: My Lord, forgive me and my parents and whoever enters my house a believer and the believing men and believing women. And do not increase the wrongdoers except in destruction.

duas.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ الَّذِي لاَ  إِلَهَ إلاَّ هُوَ الحَيُّ القَيّوُمُ وأَتُوبُ إِلَيهِ
duas.latin: Astaghfirullaah alladhee laa ilaaha illaa huwal hayyul qayyoomu wa atoobu ilayhi
duas.translation: I seek the forgiveness of Allah the Mighty, Whom there is none worthy of worship except Him, the Living, the Eternal, and I repent to Him.
duas.benefits: Seek forgiveness with this dua! The Prophet (SAW) said whoever recites this dua will be forgiven by Allah even if he fled during the advance of an army.

duas.arabic: ذٰلِکُمُ اللّٰہُ رَبِّیۡ عَلَیۡہِ تَوَکَّلۡتُ وَ اِلَیۡہِ اُنِیۡبُ
duas.latin: Dhalikumu Allahu rabbee alayhi tawakkaltu wa-ilayhi uneeb
duas.translation: (And say O Muhammad SAW to these polytheists:) Such is Allah, my Lord in Whom I put my trust, and to Him I turn in all of my affairs and in repentance.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا تَقَبَّلۡ مِنَّا ؕ اِنَّکَ اَنۡتَ السَّمِیۡعُ الۡعَلِیۡمُ
duas.latin: Rabbana taqabbal minna innaka antas Sameeaul Aleem
duas.translation: Our Lord! Accept (this service) from us: For Thou art the All-Hearing, the All-knowing.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا وَ اجۡعَلۡنَا مُسۡلِمَیۡنِ لَکَ وَ مِنۡ ذُرِّیَّتِنَاۤ اُمَّۃً مُّسۡلِمَۃً لَّکَ ۪ وَ اَرِنَا مَنَاسِکَنَا وَ تُبۡ عَلَیۡنَا ۚ اِنَّکَ اَنۡتَ التَّوَّابُ الرَّحِیۡمُ
duas.latin: Rabbana wa-j’alna Muslimayni laka wa min Dhurriyatina ‘Ummatan Muslimatan laka wa ‘Arina Manasikana wa tub ‘alayna ‘innaka ‘antat-Tawwabu-Raheem
duas.translation: Our Lord! Make of us Muslims, bowing to Thy (Will), and of our progeny a people Muslim, bowing to Thy (will); and show us our place for the celebration of (due) rites; and turn unto us (in Mercy); for Thou art the Oft-Returning, Most Merciful.

titles.title_name: For protection and help from Allah

duas.arabic: قُلۡ ہُوَ اللّٰہُ اَحَدٌ،  اَللّٰہُ الصَّمَدُ،  لَمۡ یَلِدۡ وَ لَمۡ یُوۡلَدۡوَ لَمۡ یَکُنۡ لَّہٗ  کُفُوًا اَحَدٌ
duas.latin: Qul Huwallaahu ‘Ahad. Allaahus-Samad. Lam yalid wa lam yoolad. Wa lam yaku-llahu kufuwan ‘ahad
duas.translation: He is Allah (the) One. The Self-Sufficient Master, Whom all creatures need, He begets not nor was He begotten, and there is none equal to Him.

duas.arabic: اَللّٰہُ لَاۤ اِلٰہَ اِلَّا ہُوَ اَلۡحَیُّ الۡقَیُّوۡمُ لَا تَاۡخُذُہٗ سِنَۃٌ وَّ لَا نَوۡمٌ  لَہٗ مَا فِی السَّمٰوٰتِ وَ مَا فِی الۡاَرۡضِ مَنۡ ذَا الَّذِیۡ یَشۡفَعُ عِنۡدَہٗۤ اِلَّا بِاِذۡنِہٖ  یَعۡلَمُ مَا بَیۡنَ اَیۡدِیۡہِمۡ وَ مَا خَلۡفَہُمۡ  وَ لَا یُحِیۡطُوۡنَ بِشَیۡءٍ مِّنۡ عِلۡمِہٖۤ اِلَّا بِمَا شَآءَ وَسِعَ کُرۡسِیُّہُ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَ الۡاَرۡضَ  وَ لَا یَـُٔوۡدُہٗ حِفۡظُہُمَا  وَ ہُوَ الۡعَلِیُّ الۡعَظِیۡمُ
duas.latin: Allaahu laa ‘ilaaha ‘illaa Huwal-Hayyul-Qayyoom, laa ta’khuthuhu sinatun wa laa nawm, lahu maa fis-samaawaati wa maafil-’ardh, man thal-lathee yashfa’u ‘indahu ‘illaa bi’ithnih, ya’lamu maa bayna ‘aydeehim wa maa khalfahum, wa laa yuheetoona bishay’im-min ‘ilmihi ‘illaa bimaa shaa’a, wasi’a kursiyyuhus-samaawaati wal’ardh, wa laa ya’ooduhu hifdhuhumaa, wa Huwal-’Aliyyul- ‘Adheem
duas.translation: Allah! There is none worthy of worship but He, the Ever Living, the One Who sustains and protects all that exists. Neither slumber nor sleep overtakes Him. To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth. Who is he that can intercede with Him except with His Permission? He knows what happens to them in this world, and what will happen to them in the Hereafter. And they will never compass anything of His Knowledge except that which He wills. His Throne extends over the heavens and the earth, and He feels no fatigue in guarding and preserving them. And He is the Most High, the Most Great.

duas.arabic: قُلۡ اَعُوۡذُ بِرَبِّ الۡفَلَقِ،  مِنۡ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ،  وَ مِنۡ شَرِّ غَاسِقٍ اِذَا وَقَب،  وَ مِنۡ شَرِّ النَّفّٰثٰتِ فِی الۡعُقَدِ،  وَ مِنۡ شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ اِذَا حَسَدَ
duas.latin: Qul ‘a’oothu birabbil-falaq. Min sharri maa khalaq. Wa min sharri ghaasiqin ‘ithaa waqab. Wa min sharrin-naffaathaati fil-’uqad. Wa min sharri haasidin ‘ithaa hasad
duas.translation: I seek refuge with (Allah) the Lord of the daybreak, from the evil of what He has created, and from the evil of the darkening (night) as it comes with its darkness, and from the evil of those who practice witchcraft when they blow in the knots, and from the evil of the envier when he envies.
duas.benefits: Prophet (S.A.W.) used to seek protection against the evil of jinn and the evil eyes of humans by reciting this Surah.

duas.arabic: قُلۡ اَعُوۡذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ، مَلِکِ النَّاسِ، اِلٰہِ النَّاسِ، مِنۡ شَرِّ الۡوَسۡوَاسِ الۡخَنَّاسِ، الَّذِیۡ یُوَسۡوِسُ فِیۡ صُدُوۡرِ النَّاسِ، مِنَ الۡجِنَّۃِ وَ النَّاسِ
duas.latin: Qul ‘a’oothu birabbin-naas . Malikin-naas . ‘Ilaahin-naas . Min sharril-waswaasil-khannaas. Allathee yuwaswisu fee sudoorin-naas. Minal-jinnati wannaas
duas.translation: I seek refuge with (Allah) the Lord of mankind, the King of mankind, the God of mankind, from the evil of the whisperer who withdraws, who whispers in the breasts of mankind, of jinns and men.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ،  وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْمَسِيحِ الدَّجَّالِ،  وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْمَحْيَا وَالْمَمَاتِ  اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ الْمَأْثَمِ وَالْمَغْرَمِ
duas.latin: Allaahumma ‘innee ‘a’oothu bika min ‘athaabil-qabri, wa ‘a’oothu bika min fitnatil-maseehid-dajjaali, wa ‘a’oothu bika min fitnatil-mahyaa walmamaati. Allaahumma ‘innee ‘a’oothu bika minal-ma’thami walmaghrami
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the punishment of the grave, and I seek refuge in You from the trial of the False Messiah, and I seek refuge in You from the trials of life and death. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from sin and from debt.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ قِنِي عَذَابَكَ يَوْمَ تَبْعَثُ عِبَادَكَ
duas.latin: Allahumma qinee AAathabaka yawma tabAAathu AAibadak.
duas.translation: O Allah, protect me from Your punishment on the day Your servants are resurrected.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ فَاطِرَ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالأَرْضِ عَالِمَ الْغَيْبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ رَبَّ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَمَلِيكَهُ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ نَفْسِي وَمِنْ شَرِّ الشَّيْطَانِ وَشَرَكِهِ وَأَنْ أَقْتَرِفَ عَلَى نَفْسِي سُوءًا أَوْ أَجُرَّهُ إِلَى مُسْلِمٍ
duas.latin: Allaahumma faatiras-samaawaati wal’ardhi, Aalimal-ghaybi wash-shahaadati, laa ‘ilaaha ‘illaa ‘Anta, rabba kulli shai’in wa malīkahu, ‘a’oothu bika min sharri nafsee, wa min sharrish-shaytaani wa sharakihi, wa ‘an ‘aqtarifa ‘alaa nafsee soo’an, ‘aw ‘ajurrahu ‘ilaa Muslimin
duas.translation: O Allah, Creator of the heavens and the earth, Knower of the unseen and the seen, there is none worthy of worship except You, Lord of everything and its Owner, I seek refuge in You from the evil of my soul and from the evil of Shaitan and his Shirk, or that I should do some evil to myself or bring it upon a Muslim.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَفْوَ وَالْعَافِيَةَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالآخِرَةِ اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَفْوَ وَالْعَافِيَةَ فِي دِينِي وَدُنْيَاىَ وَأَهْلِي وَمَالِي اللَّهُمَّ اسْتُرْ عَوْرَاتِي وَآمِنْ رَوْعَاتِي وَاحْفَظْنِي مِنْ بَيْنِ يَدَىَّ وَمِنْ خَلْفِي وَعَنْ يَمِينِي وَعَنْ شِمَالِي وَمِنْ فَوْقِي وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ أَنْ أُغْتَالَ مِنْ تَحْتِي
duas.latin: Allahumma inni as’alukal-’afwa wal-’afiyah fid-dunya wal-akhirah. Allahumma inni as’alukal-’afwa wal-’afiyah fi dini wa dunyaya wa ahli wa mali. Allahum-mastur ‘awrati, wa amin raw’ati wahfazni min bayni yadayya, wa min khalfi, wa ‘an yamini wa ‘an shimali, wa min fawqi, wa ‘audhu bika an ughtala min tahti
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for forgiveness and well-being in this world and in the Hereafter. O Allah, I ask You for forgiveness and well-being in my religious and my worldly affairs. O Allah, conceal my faults, calm my fears, and protect me from before me and behind me, from my right and my left, and from above me, and I seek refuge in You from being taken unaware from beneath me.

duas.arabic: اَنَّ اللّٰہَ مَوۡلٰىکُمۡ ؕ نِعۡمَ الۡمَوۡلٰی وَ نِعۡمَ النَّصِیۡرُ
duas.latin: Anna Allaha mawlakum ni’mal mawla wa ni’man naseer
duas.translation: Know that Allah is your protector. Excellent is the protector, and Excellent is the helper.

duas.arabic: رَّبِّ اَعُوۡذُ بِکَ مِنۡ ہَمَزٰتِ الشَّیٰطِیۡنِ وَ اَعُوۡذُ بِکَ رَبِّ اَنۡ یَّحۡضُرُوۡنِ
duas.latin: Rabbi ‘a`outhubika min hamazaatish-shayaateeni, wa ‘a`outhu bika rabbi ‘ay-yahdhuroon
duas.translation: My Lord! I seek refuge with You from the whisperings (suggestions) of the Shayatin (devils). And I seek refuge with You, My Lord! lest they may attend (or come near) me.
duas.benefits: This dua was taught by Allah SWT to Prophet (SAW)

duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِاللّٰهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطانِ الرَّجِيْمِ
duas.latin: A’oothu billaahi minash-Shaytaanir-rajeem
duas.translation: I seek refuge with Allah against the Satan, the outcast.

titles.title_name: For protection from the evil eye

duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللّٰهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
duas.latin: A’oothu bikalimaatil-laahit-taammaati min sharri maa khalaqa
duas.translation: I seek refuge in the Perfect Words of Allah from the evil of what He has created.
duas.benefits: Prophet (S.A.W.) said "When anyone lands at a place, and says these words, nothing would harm him until he marches from that stopping place."

titles.title_name: To keep your family safe from transgressors

duas.arabic: رَبِّ نَجِّنِیۡ وَ اَہۡلِیۡ مِمَّا یَعۡمَلُوۡنَ
duas.latin: Rabbi najjinee waahlee mimma ya’maloon.
duas.translation: My Lord! Save me and my family from what they do.
duas.benefits: This dua was asked by Prophet Lut (AS).

duas.arabic: أُعِيذُكُمَا بِكَلِمَاتِ اللّٰهِ التَّامَّةِ مِنْ كُلِّ شَيْطَانٍ وَهَامَّةٍ وَمِنْ كُلِّ عَيْنٍ لاَمَّةٍ
duas.latin: U’eethukumaa bikalimaatil-laahit-taammati min kulli shaytaanin wa haammatin, wa min kulli ‘aynin laammatin
duas.translation: I seek protection for you in the Perfect Words of Allah from every devil and every beast, and from every envious blameworthy eye.
duas.benefits: Seek protection by reciting this dua! Ibn'Abbas related that the Prophet Muhammad (SAW) used to seek Allah's protection for Al-Hassan and Al-Hussain by reciting this dua.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَاۤ اَخۡرِجۡنَا مِنۡ ہٰذِہِ الۡقَرۡیَۃِ الظَّالِمِ اَہۡلُہَا وَ اجۡعَلۡ لَّنَا مِنۡ لَّدُنۡکَ وَلِیًّا وَّ اجۡعَلۡ لَّنَا مِنۡ لَّدُنۡکَ نَصِیۡرًا
duas.latin: rabbana akhrijna min hathihialqaryati aththalimi ahluhawajAAal lana min ladunka waliyyan wajAAallana min ladunka naseera
duas.translation: Our Lord! Rescue us from this town whose people are oppressors; and raise for us from You one who will protect, and raise for us from You one who will help.
duas.benefits: This dua was asked by the early Muslims of the Makkah city when the Quruaish tribe oppressed them.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ عَضُدِي وَنَصِيرِي بِكَ أَحُولُ وَبِكَ أَصُولُ وَبِكَ أُقَاتِلُ
duas.latin: Allaahumma ‘Anta ‘adhudee, wa ‘Anta naseeree, bika ‘ahoolu, wa bika ‘asoolu, wa bika ‘uqaatilu
duas.translation: O Allah, You are my aid ane my support. By Your defend, by You I attack and by Your I fight.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ مُنْزِلَ الْكِتَابِ سَرِيعَ الْحِسَابِ اهْزِمِ الأَحْزَابَ اللَّهُمَّ اهْزِمْهُمْ وَزَلْزِلْهُمْ
duas.latin: Allaahumma munzilal-kitaabi, saree’al-hisaabi-hzimil-’ahzaaba- Allaahumma-hzimhum wa zalzilhum
duas.translation: Allah, Revealer of the Book, Swift to account, defeat the groups (of disbelievers). O Allah, defeat them and shake them.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِيهِمْ بِمَا شِئْتَ
duas.latin: Allaahummak-fineehim bimaa shi’ta
duas.translation: O Allah, suffice (i.e. protect) me against them however You wish.

duas.arabic: لَّاۤ اِلٰہَ اِلَّاۤ اللّٰہُ
duas.latin: Laa ‘ilaaha ‘illallaahu
duas.translation: There is none worthy of worship but Allah.

duas.arabic: عَلَی اللّٰہِ تَوَکَّلۡنَا ۚ رَبَّنَا لَا تَجۡعَلۡنَا فِتۡنَۃً  لِّلۡقَوۡمِ الظّٰلِمِیۡنَ وَ نَجِّنَا بِرَحۡمَتِکَ مِنَ الۡقَوۡمِ الۡکٰفِرِیۡنَ
duas.latin: Alal Allahi thawakkalna rabbana la taj’alna fitnatal lil-qawmidh-Dhalimeen. Wa najjina bi-Rahmatika minal qawmil kafireen.
duas.translation: Upon Allah do we rely. Our Lord, make us not [objects of] trial for the wrongdoing people. And save us by Your mercy from the disbelieving people.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ أَنْ أُشْرِكَ بِكَ وَأَنَا أَعْلَمُ،  وَأَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِمَا لاَ أَعْلَمُ
duas.latin: Allaahumma ‘innee ‘a’oothu bika ‘an ‘ushrika bika wa ‘anaa ‘a’lamu, wa ‘astaghfiruka limaa laa ‘a’lamu
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You lest I associate anything with You knowingly, and I seek Your forgiveness for what I know not.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا لَا تَجۡعَلۡنَا مَعَ الۡقَوۡمِ الظّٰلِمِیۡنَ
duas.latin: Rabbanaa Laa Taj-a’lnaa Ma – A’l Qawmiz’ Z’aalimeen
duas.translation: Our Lord! Place us not with the people who are Zaalimoon (polytheists and wrong doers).

duas.arabic: رَبِّ فَلَا تَجۡعَلۡنِیۡ فِی الۡقَوۡمِ الظّٰلِمِیۡنَ
duas.latin: Rabbi fala tajAAalnee fee alqawmi aththalimeen
duas.translation: My Lord, then do not place me among the wrongdoing people.
duas.benefits: Allah taught this dua to Prophet (SAW).

duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللّٰهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
duas.latin: Bismil-lahil-lathee la yadurru maAAas-mihi shay-on fil-ardi wala fis-sama-i wahuwas-sameeAAul-AAaleem.
duas.translation: In the name of Allah with whose name nothing is harmed on earth nor in the heavens and He is The All-Seeing, The All-Knowing.(three times)
duas.benefits: Recite this dua three times

duas.arabic: اَللّٰہُ لَاۤ اِلٰہَ اِلَّا ہُوَ اَلۡحَیُّ الۡقَیُّوۡمُ لَا تَاۡخُذُہٗ سِنَۃٌ وَّ لَا نَوۡمٌ  لَہٗ مَا فِی السَّمٰوٰتِ وَ مَا فِی الۡاَرۡضِ مَنۡ ذَا الَّذِیۡ یَشۡفَعُ عِنۡدَہٗۤ اِلَّا بِاِذۡنِہٖ  یَعۡلَمُ مَا بَیۡنَ اَیۡدِیۡہِمۡ وَ مَا خَلۡفَہُمۡ  وَ لَا یُحِیۡطُوۡنَ بِشَیۡءٍ مِّنۡ عِلۡمِہٖۤ اِلَّا بِمَا شَآءَ وَسِعَ کُرۡسِیُّہُ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَ الۡاَرۡضَ  وَ لَا یَـُٔوۡدُہٗ حِفۡظُہُمَا  وَ ہُوَ الۡعَلِیُّ الۡعَظِیۡمُ
duas.latin: Allaahu laa ‘ilaaha ‘illaa Huwal-Hayyul-Qayyoom, laa ta’khuthuhu sinatun wa laa nawm, lahu maa fis-samaawaati wa maafil-’ardh, man thal-lathee yashfa’u ‘indahu ‘illaa bi’ithnih, ya’lamu maa bayna ‘aydeehim wa maa khalfahum, wa laa yuheetoona bishay’im-min ‘ilmihi ‘illaa bimaa shaa’a, wasi’a kursiyyuhus-samaawaati wal’ardh, wa laa ya’ooduhu hifdhuhumaa, wa Huwal-’Aliyyul- ‘Adheem
duas.translation: Allah! There is none worthy of worship but He, the Ever Living, the One Who sustains and protects all that exists. Neither slumber nor sleep overtakes Him. To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth. Who is he that can intercede with Him except with His Permission? He knows what happens to them in this world, and what will happen to them in the Hereafter. And they will never compass anything of His Knowledge except that which He wills. His Throne extends over the heavens and the earth, and He feels no fatigue in guarding and preserving them. And He is the Most High, the Most Great.
duas.benefits: The Prophet (SAW) said: 'When you are about to sleep, recite Ayatul Kursi till the end of the verse for there will remain over you a protection from Allah and no devil will draw near to you until morning'.

duas.arabic:
[سُوۡرَةُ الإخلاص] 
 قُلۡ ہُوَ اللّٰہُ اَحَدٌ،  اَللّٰہُ الصَّمَدُ،  لَمۡ یَلِدۡ وَ لَمۡ یُوۡلَدۡوَ لَمۡ یَکُنۡ لَّہٗ  کُفُوًا اَحَدٌ 

[سُوۡرَةُ الفَلَق]
 قُلۡ اَعُوۡذُ بِرَبِّ الۡفَلَقِ،  مِنۡ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ،  وَ مِنۡ شَرِّ غَاسِقٍ اِذَا وَقَب،  وَ مِنۡ شَرِّ النَّفّٰثٰتِ فِی الۡعُقَدِ،  وَ مِنۡ شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ اِذَا حَسَدَ 

[سُوۡرَةُ  النَّاس]
 قُلۡ اَعُوۡذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ، مَلِکِ النَّاسِ، اِلٰہِ النَّاسِ، مِنۡ شَرِّ الۡوَسۡوَاسِ الۡخَنَّاسِ، الَّذِیۡ یُوَسۡوِسُ فِیۡ صُدُوۡرِ النَّاسِ، مِنَ الۡجِنَّۃِ وَ النَّاسِ
duas.latin: [Surah Al-Ikhlas]Qul Huwa-llahu ‘Ahad, Allahus-Samad, Lam Yalid Wa Lam Yulad, Walam Yakul-La-Hu-Kufuwan ‘Ahad. [Surah Al-Falaq]Qul ‘A’udhu Bi-Rabbil-Falaq, Min Sharri Ma Khalaq, Wa Min Sharri Ghasiqin ‘Idha Waqab, Wa Min Sharri-Naffathati Fil-‘Uqadi, Wa Min Sharri Hasidin ‘Idha Hasad. [Surah An-Nas]Qul ‘A’udhu Bi-Rabbin-Nas, Malikin-Nas, Ilahin-Nas, Min-Sharril-Waswasil-Khan-Nas, Al-Ladhi Yuwas-wisu Fee Sudurin-Nas, Mina Al-Jinnati Wan-Nas.
duas.translation: [Surah Al-Ikhlas] Say, He is Allah, [who is] One, Allah, the Eternal Refuge, He neither begets nor is born, Nor is there to Him any equivalent. [Surah Al-Falaq] Say, I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak, From the evil of that which He created, And from the evil of darkness when it settles, And from the evil of the blowers in knots, And from the evil of an envier when he envies. [Surah An-Nas] Say, I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind, The Sovereign of mankind, The God of mankind, From the evil of the retreating whisperer, Who whispers [evil] into the breasts of mankind, From among the jinn and mankind.

duas.arabic: اَلۡحَمۡدُ لِلّٰہِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنَا وَسَقَانَا وَكَفَانَا وَآوَانَا فَكَمْ مِمَّنْ لاَ كَافِيَ لَهُ وَلاَ مُئْوِيَ
duas.latin: Alhamdu lillahil-lathee atAAamana wasaqana, wakafana, wa-awana, fakam mimman la kafiya lahu wala mu/wee.
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah, Who fed us and gave us drink, and Who is sufficient for us and has sheltered us, for how many have none to suffice them or shelter them.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ عَالِمَ الغَيْبِ والشَّهَادَةِ، فَاطِرَ السَّموَاتِ والأرْضِ، رَبَّ كُلِّ  شَیۡءٍ ومَلِيْكَهُ، أشْهَدُ أنْ لَا إلَهَ إلاَّ أنْتَ، أعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ نَفْسِي، وَمِنْ شَرِّ الشَّيْطَانِ وَشِرْكِهِ
duas.latin: Allahumma AAalimal-ghaybi washshahadah, fatiras-samawati wal-ard, rabba kulli shayin wamaleekah, ashhadu an la ilaha illa ant, aAAoothu bika min sharri nafsee wamin sharrish-shaytani washirkih
duas.translation: O Allah Knower of the Unseen and the Seen, Originator of the heavens and the earth, Lord of everything and its Possessor, I bear witness that there is none worthy of worship except You, I seek refuge from You from the evil of my soul and from the evil of Shaitan and his Shirk.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَسْلَمْتُ نَفْسِي إِلَيْكَ، وَفَوَّضْتُ أَمْرِي إِلَيْكَ، وَوَجَّهْتُ وَجْهِي إِلَيْكَ، وَأَلْجَأْتُ ظَهْرِي إِلَيْكَ، رَغْبَةً وَرَهْبَةً إِلَيْكَ، لاَ مَلْجَأَ وَلاَ مَنْجَا مِنْكَ إِلاَّ إِلَيْكَ، آمَنْتُ بِكِتَابِكَ الَّذِي أَنْزَلْتَ، وَبِنَبِيِّكَ الَّذِي أَرْسَلْتَ
duas.latin: Allahumma aslamtu nafsi ilaika wa fauwadtu `Amri ilaika, wa wajjahtu wajhi ilaika wa aljaatu zahri ilaika, reghbatan wa rahbatan ilaika. La maljaa wa la manja minka illa ilaika. Amantu bikitabikal-ladhi anzalta; wa nabiyyikalladhi arsalta
duas.translation: O Allah! I have surrendered myself over to you and have turned my face towards You, and leave all my affairs to You and depend on You and put my trust in You expecting Your reward and fearing Your punishment. There is neither fleeing from You nor refuge but with You. I believe in the Book (Qur’an) which You have revealed and in Your Prophet (Muhammad) whom You have sent.

duas.arabic: اَللّٰہُ لَاۤ اِلٰہَ اِلَّا ہُوَ اَلۡحَیُّ الۡقَیُّوۡمُ لَا تَاۡخُذُہٗ سِنَۃٌ وَّ لَا نَوۡمٌ  لَہٗ مَا فِی السَّمٰوٰتِ وَ مَا فِی الۡاَرۡضِ مَنۡ ذَا الَّذِیۡ یَشۡفَعُ عِنۡدَہٗۤ اِلَّا بِاِذۡنِہٖ  یَعۡلَمُ مَا بَیۡنَ اَیۡدِیۡہِمۡ وَ مَا خَلۡفَہُمۡ  وَ لَا یُحِیۡطُوۡنَ بِشَیۡءٍ مِّنۡ عِلۡمِہٖۤ اِلَّا بِمَا شَآءَ وَسِعَ کُرۡسِیُّہُ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَ الۡاَرۡضَ  وَ لَا یَـُٔوۡدُہٗ حِفۡظُہُمَا  وَ ہُوَ الۡعَلِیُّ الۡعَظِیۡمُ
duas.latin: Allaahu laa ‘ilaaha ‘illaa Huwal-Hayyul-Qayyoom, laa ta’khuthuhu sinatun wa laa nawm, lahu maa fis-samaawaati wa maafil-’ardh, man thal-lathee yashfa’u ‘indahu ‘illaa bi’ithnih, ya’lamu maa bayna ‘aydeehim wa maa khalfahum, wa laa yuheetoona bishay’im-min ‘ilmihi ‘illaa bimaa shaa’a, wasi’a kursiyyuhus-samaawaati wal’ardh, wa laa ya’ooduhu hifdhuhumaa, wa Huwal-’Aliyyul- ‘Adheem
duas.translation: Allah! There is none worthy of worship but He, the Ever Living, the One Who sustains and protects all that exists. Neither slumber nor sleep overtakes Him. To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth. Who is he that can intercede with Him except with His Permission? He knows what happens to them in this world, and what will happen to them in the Hereafter. And they will never compass anything of His Knowledge except that which He wills. His Throne extends over the heavens and the earth, and He feels no fatigue in guarding and preserving them. And He is the Most High, the Most Great.
duas.benefits: The Prophet (SAW) said: 'When you are about to sleep, recite Ayatul Kursi till the end of the verse for there will remain over you a protection from Allah and no devil will draw near to you until morning'.

duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللّٰہِ  (33 times) الۡحَمۡدُ لِلّٰہ  (33 times) اَللّٰہُ اَکۡبَر  (34 times)
duas.latin: Subhana-Allah (33 times) Alhamdulillah (33 times) Allahu Akbar (34 times)
duas.translation: Glory be to Allah (33 times), Praise be to Allah (33 times), Allah is the greatest (34 times)
duas.benefits: Prophet (S.A.W.) taught this Tasbih to his beloved daughter Fatima (R.A.) and advised her to recite it every day before sleeping.

duas.arabic:
[سُوۡرَةُ الإخلاص] 
 قُلۡ ہُوَ اللّٰہُ اَحَدٌ،  اَللّٰہُ الصَّمَدُ،  لَمۡ یَلِدۡ وَ لَمۡ یُوۡلَدۡوَ لَمۡ یَکُنۡ لَّہٗ  کُفُوًا اَحَدٌ 

[سُوۡرَةُ الفَلَق]
 قُلۡ اَعُوۡذُ بِرَبِّ الۡفَلَقِ،  مِنۡ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ،  وَ مِنۡ شَرِّ غَاسِقٍ اِذَا وَقَب،  وَ مِنۡ شَرِّ النَّفّٰثٰتِ فِی الۡعُقَدِ،  وَ مِنۡ شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ اِذَا حَسَدَ 

[سُوۡرَةُ  النَّاس]
 قُلۡ اَعُوۡذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ، مَلِکِ النَّاسِ، اِلٰہِ النَّاسِ، مِنۡ شَرِّ الۡوَسۡوَاسِ الۡخَنَّاسِ، الَّذِیۡ یُوَسۡوِسُ فِیۡ صُدُوۡرِ النَّاسِ، مِنَ الۡجِنَّۃِ وَ النَّاسِ
duas.latin: [Surah Al-Ikhlas]Qul Huwa-llahu ‘Ahad, Allahus-Samad, Lam Yalid Wa Lam Yulad, Walam Yakul-La-Hu-Kufuwan ‘Ahad. [Surah Al-Falaq]Qul ‘A’udhu Bi-Rabbil-Falaq, Min Sharri Ma Khalaq, Wa Min Sharri Ghasiqin ‘Idha Waqab, Wa Min Sharri-Naffathati Fil-‘Uqadi, Wa Min Sharri Hasidin ‘Idha Hasad. [Surah An-Nas]Qul ‘A’udhu Bi-Rabbin-Nas, Malikin-Nas, Ilahin-Nas, Min-Sharril-Waswasil-Khan-Nas, Al-Ladhi Yuwas-wisu Fee Sudurin-Nas, Mina Al-Jinnati Wan-Nas.
duas.translation: [Surah Al-Ikhlas] Say, He is Allah, [who is] One, Allah, the Eternal Refuge, He neither begets nor is born, Nor is there to Him any equivalent. [Surah Al-Falaq] Say, I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak, From the evil of that which He created, And from the evil of darkness when it settles, And from the evil of the blowers in knots, And from the evil of an envier when he envies. [Surah An-Nas] Say, I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind, The Sovereign of mankind, The God of mankind, From the evil of the retreating whisperer, Who whispers [evil] into the breasts of mankind, From among the jinn and mankind.
duas.benefits: Whenever the Prophet (S.A.W.) went to bed every night, he used to cup his hands together and blow over it after reciting these three Surahs and then rub his hands over whatever parts of his body he was able to rub, starting with his head, face and front of his body. He used to do that three times.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِلْماً نَافِعاً،  وَرِزْقاً طَيِّباً،  وَعَمَلاً مُتَقَبَّلاً
duas.latin: Allaahumma ‘innee ‘as’aluka ‘ilman naafi’an, wa rizqan tayyiban, wa ‘amalan mutaqabbalan
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for knowledge that is of benefit, a good provision, and deeds that will be accepted.
duas.benefits: Prophet (S.A.W.) used to recite this dua everday immediately after Fajr Prayer.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْجَنَّةَ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ
duas.latin: Allaahumma ‘innee ‘as’alukal-jannata wa ‘a’oothu bika minan-naar
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for Paradise and seek Your protection from the Fire.

duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللّٰهِ وَالْحَمْدُ لِلّٰهِ وَلَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ وَاللّٰهُ اَکۡبَرُ
duas.latin: Subhaanallaahi, Walhamdu lillaahi, Wala Illaha Illallahu, Wallaahu ‘Akbar
duas.translation: Glory is to Allah, praise is to Allah, there is no god but Allah and Allah is the Most Great.
duas.benefits: This dua is very close to Prophet Muhammad (SAW). The Prophet (SAW) said: 'Saying this dua is more beloved to me than everything the sun has risen over (i.e the whole world).'

duas.arabic: لَّاۤ اِلٰہَ  اِلَّاۤ اَنۡتَ سُبۡحٰنَکَ  اِنِّیۡ کُنۡتُ مِنَ الظّٰلِمِیۡنَ
duas.latin: Laa ‘ilaaha ‘illaa ‘Anta subhaanaka ‘innee kuntu minadh-dhaalimeen
duas.translation: There is none worthy of worship but You, glory is to You. Surely, I was among the wrongdoers.
duas.benefits: Prophet Yunus supplicate this Dua to Allah when he was in the belly of the whale.

duas.arabic: بِسۡمِ اللّٰہِ  الرَّحۡمٰنِ الرَّحِیۡمِ
duas.latin: Bismi-llahi r-raḥmani r-raḥim
duas.translation: In the name of Allah, the Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful.

titles.title_name: For success in this world and aakhira

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَاۤ اٰتِنَا فِی الدُّنۡیَا حَسَنَۃً وَّ فِی الۡاٰخِرَۃِ حَسَنَۃً وَّ قِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
duas.latin: Rabbanaaa Aatinaa Fiddunyaa H’asanah Wa Fil Aakhirati H’asanah Wa Qinaa A’d’aaban Naar
duas.translation: Our Lord! Give us in this world that which is good and in the Hereafter that which is good, and save us from the torment of the Fire!
duas.benefits: This is the Prophet's (SAW) most read supplication to Allah. It is a comprehensive dua which contains everything we need for this world and the hereafter. We can recite this dua at all times.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَاۤ اِنَّکَ جَامِعُ النَّاسِ لِیَوۡمٍ لَّا رَیۡبَ فِیۡہِ ؕ اِنَّ اللّٰہَ لَا یُخۡلِفُ الۡمِیۡعَادَ
duas.latin: Rabbana innaka jami’unnasi li-Yawmil la rayba fi innAllaha la yukhliful mi’aad
duas.translation: Our Lord, surely You will gather the people for a Day about which there is no doubt. Indeed, Allah does not fail in His promise.

duas.arabic: قُلۡ ہُوَ اللّٰہُ اَحَدٌ،  اَللّٰہُ الصَّمَدُ،  لَمۡ یَلِدۡ وَ لَمۡ یُوۡلَدۡوَ لَمۡ یَکُنۡ لَّہٗ  کُفُوًا اَحَدٌ
duas.latin: [Surah Al-Ikhlas]Qul Huwa-llahu ‘Ahad, Allahus-Samad, Lam Yalid Wa Lam Yulad, Walam Yakul-La-Hu-Kufuwan ‘Ahad.
duas.translation: [Surah Al-Ikhlas]Say, "He is Allah, [who is] One, Allah, the Eternal Refuge, He neither begets nor is born, Nor is there to Him any equivalent."
duas.benefits: Prophet (S.A.W.) said that reciting Surah Al-Ikhlas (Surah No. 112) one time is equal to one third of the Quran.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِلْماً نَافِعاً،  وَرِزْقاً طَيِّباً،  وَعَمَلاً مُتَقَبَّلاً
duas.latin: Allaahumma ‘innee ‘as’aluka ‘ilman naafi’an, wa rizqan tayyiban, wa ‘amalan mutaqabbalan
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for knowledge that is of benefit, a good provision, and deeds that will be accepted.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَارْحَمْنِي وَعَافِنِي وَاهْدِنِي وَارْزُقْنِي
duas.latin: Allaahum-maghfir lee, warhamnee, wa ‘aafinee, wahdinee, warzuqnee
duas.translation: O Allah, forgive me, have mercy on me, guide me, heal me, and provide for me.

duas.arabic: اَللّٰہُ لَطِیۡفٌۢ بِعِبَادِہٖ یَرۡزُقُ مَنۡ یَّشَآءُ وَ ہُوَ الۡقَوِیُّ الۡعَزِیۡزُ
duas.latin: Allahu lateefun biAAibadihiyarzuqu man yashao wahuwa alqawiyyu alAAazeez
duas.translation: Allah is very Gracious and Kind to His slaves. He gives provisions to whom He wills. And He is the All-Strong, the All-Mighty.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَاۤ اَنۡزِلۡ عَلَیۡنَا مَآئِدَۃً مِّنَ السَّمَآءِ تَکُوۡنُ لَنَا عِیۡدًا لِّاَوَّلِنَا وَ اٰخِرِنَا وَ اٰیَۃً مِّنۡکَ ۚ وَ ارۡزُقۡنَا وَ اَنۡتَ خَیۡرُ الرّٰزِقِیۡنَ
duas.latin: Rabbana anzil 'alayna ma'idatam minas-Samai takoonu lana 'idal li-awwa-lina wa aakhirina wa ayatam-minka war-zuqna wa anta Khayrul-Raziqeen
duas.translation: O Allah our Lord! Send us from heaven a table set (with viands), that there may be for us - for the first and the last of us - a solemn festival and a sign from thee; and provide for our sustenance, for thou art the best Sustainer (of our needs).

duas.arabic: رَبِّ اِنِّیۡ لِمَاۤ اَنۡزَلۡتَ اِلَیَّ مِنۡ خَیۡرٍ فَقِیۡرٌ
duas.latin: Rabbi innee lima anzalta ilayya min khayrin faqeer
duas.translation: My Lord! Truly, I am in need of whatever good that You bestow on me!

duas.arabic: اللّٰہُمَّ مٰلِکَ الۡمُلۡکِ تُؤۡتِی الۡمُلۡکَ مَنۡ تَشَآءُ وَ تَنۡزِعُ الۡمُلۡکَ مِمَّنۡ تَشَآءُ ۫ وَ تُعِزُّ مَنۡ تَشَآءُ وَ تُذِلُّ مَنۡ تَشَآءُ ؕ بِیَدِکَ الۡخَیۡرُ ؕ اِنَّکَ عَلٰی کُلِّ شَیۡءٍ قَدِیۡرٌ، تُوۡلِجُ الَّیۡلَ فِی النَّہَارِ وَ تُوۡلِجُ النَّہَارَ فِی الَّیۡلِ ۫ وَ تُخۡرِجُ الۡحَیَّ مِنَ الۡمَیِّتِ وَ تُخۡرِجُ الۡمَیِّتَ مِنَ الۡحَیِّ ۫ وَ تَرۡزُقُ مَنۡ تَشَآءُ بِغَیۡرِ حِسَابٍ
duas.latin: allahumma malika almulkitu/tee almulka man tashao watanziAAu almulka mimman tashaowatuAAizzu man tashao watuthillu man tashaobiyadika alkhayru innaka AAala kulli shay-in qadeer. Tooliju allayla fee annahariwatooliju annahara fee allayli watukhriju alhayyamina almayyiti watukhriju almayyita mina alhayyi watarzuquman tashao bighayri hisab.
duas.translation: O Allah! Possessor of the kingdom, You give the kingdom to whom You will, and You take the kingdom from whom You will, and You endue with honour whom You will, and You humiliate whom You will. In Your Hand is the good. Verily, You are Able to do all things. You make the night to enter into the day, and You make the day to enter into the night (i.e. increase and decrease in the hours of the night and the day during winter and summer), You bring the living out of the dead, and You bring the dead out of the living. And You give wealth and sustenance to whom You will, without limit (measure or account).

duas.arabic: وَ مَا تَوۡفِیۡقِیۡۤ اِلَّا بِاللّٰہِ ؕعَلَیۡہِ تَوَکَّلۡتُ وَ اِلَیۡہِ اُنِیۡبُ
duas.latin: Wama tawfeeqee illa billahiAAalayhi tawakkaltu wa-ilayhi oneeb
duas.translation: My success is not but through Allah. Upon him I have relied, and to Him I return.
duas.benefits: Prophet Shuaib (AS) recited this dua.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي بَدَنِي اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي سَمْعِي اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي بَصَرِي لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْكُفْرِ وَالْفَقْرِ اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ
duas.latin: Allahumma AAafinee fee badanee, allahumma AAafinee fee samAAee, allahumma AAafinee fee basaree, la ilaha illa anta. Allahumma innee aAAoothu bika minal-kufri, walfaqri, Allahumma innee aAAoothu bika min AAathabil-qabri, la ilaha illa anta.
duas.translation: O Allah, grant my body health, O Allah, grant my hearing health, O Allah, grant my sight health. None has the right to be worshipped except You. O Allah, I take refuge with You from disbelief and poverty, and I take refuge with You from the punishment of the grave. None has the right to be worshipped except You.
duas.benefits: Recite this dua three times

duas.arabic: لَا بَأْسَ طَهُورٌ إِنْ شَاءَ اللّٰهُ
duas.latin: Laa ba’sa tahoorun ‘inshaa’Allaah.
duas.translation: Do not worry, it will be a purification (for you), Allah willing.
duas.benefits: Prophet (S.A.W.) used to say this Dua whenever He (S.A.W.) visited a an ailing person.

duas.arabic: أَسْأَلُ اللّٰهَ الْعَظِيمَ رَبَّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ أَنْ يَشْفِيَكَ
duas.latin: As’alullaahal-’Adheema Rabbal-’Arshil-’Adheemi ‘an yashfiyaka.
duas.translation: I ask Allah who is the Lofty and the Lord of the Mighty Throne that He cures you (Prophet Mohammad (SAW.) said that by reciting this dua seven times, the ill person will regain his health and if death occurs then that (death) is a different issue (i.e. death is written it cannot be prevented))
duas.benefits: Recite seven times.

duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللّٰهِ، أَعُوذُ بِعِزَّةِ اللّٰهِ وَقُدْرَتِهِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا أَجِدُ وَأُحَاذِرُ. (سَبْعَ مَرَّاتٍ)
duas.latin: Bismillah, A’udhu bi’izzatil-lahi wa qudratihi min sharri ma ajidu wa uhadhiru.
duas.translation: In the Name of Allah, I seek refuge in the might and power of Allah from the evil of what I feel and what I fear.
duas.benefits: Get relief from pain by placing your hand on the problem area and reciting the dua (seven times).

titles.title_name: Upon seeing someone going through a trial or tribulation

duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلّٰهِ الَّذِي عَافَانِي مِمَّا ابْتَلاَكَ بِهِ وَفَضَّلَنِي عَلَى كَثِيرٍ مِمَّنْ خَلَقَ تَفْضِيلاً
duas.latin: Alhamdu lillaahil-lathee ‘aafaanee mimmab-talaaka bihi wa fadhdhalanee ‘alaa katheerin mimman khalaqa tafdheela
duas.translation: Praise is to Allah Who has spared me what He has afflicted you with, and preferred me greatly above much of what He has created.

titles.title_name: If you fall on hard times

duas.arabic: اَنِّیۡ مَسَّنِیَ الضُّرُّ وَ اَنۡتَ اَرۡحَمُ الرّٰحِمِیۡنَ
duas.latin: Annee massaniya addurru waanta arhamuarrahimeen
duas.translation: Indeed, adversity has touched me, and you are the Most Merciful of the merciful.
duas.benefits: Read this dua in times of sickness! Prophet Ayyob (AS) recited this dua when he was suffering from a terrible disease that spread all over his body.

titles.title_name: When you are nearing your death

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَارْحَمْنِي وَأَلْحِقْنِي بِالرَّفِيقِ الأَعْلَى
duas.latin: Allaahum-maghfir lee warhamnee wa ‘alhiqnee bir-rafeeqil-’a’laa
duas.translation: O Allah, forgive me and have mercy upon me and join me with the highest companions (in Paradise).

duas.arabic: لَا اِلٰہَ اِلَّا اللّٰہُ وَاللّٰهُ اَکۡبَرُ، لَا اِلٰہَ اِلَّا اللّٰہُ وَحْدَهُ، لَا اِلٰہَ اِلَّا اللّٰہُ لَا شَرِيۡکَ لَهُ، لَا اِلٰہَ اِلَّا اللّٰہُ لَهُ الْمُلْکُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ، لَا اِلٰہَ اِلَّا اللّٰہُ وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ اِلَّا بِاللّٰہِِ
duas.latin: Laa ‘ilaaha ‘illallaahu wallaahu ‘Akbar, laa ‘ilaaha ‘illallaahu wahdahu, laa ‘ilaaha ‘illallaahu laa shareeka lahu, laa ‘ilaaha ‘illallaahu lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu, laa ‘ilaaha ‘illallaahu wa laa hawla wa laa quwwata ‘illaa billaah
duas.translation: There is none worthy of worship but Allah, Allah is the Most Great. None has the right to be worshipped but Allah alone. None has the right to be worshipped but Allah alone, Who has no partner. There is none worthy of worship but Allah, His is the dominion and His is the praise. There is none worthy of worship but Allah, there is no power and no might but by Allah.

duas.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ أَهْلَ الدِّيَارِ مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُسْلِمِينَ وَإِنَّا إِنْ شَاءَ اللّٰهُ بِكُمْ لاَحِقُونَ نَسْأَلُ اللّٰهَ لَنَا وَلَكُمُ الْعَافِيَةَ
duas.latin: Assalaamu ‘alaykum ‘ahlad-diyaari, minal-mu’mineena walmuslimeena, wa ‘innaa ‘in shaa’ Allaahu bikum laahiqoona [wa yarhamullaahul-mustaqdimeena minnaa walmusta’khireena] ‘as’alullaaha lanaa wa lakumul- ‘aafiyata.
duas.translation: Oh Muslims residing here, salaams on you, by the will of Allah we will also be coming to you. We seek safety for us and you.

duas.arabic: [سُوۡرَةُ الفَلَق]  قُلۡ اَعُوۡذُ بِرَبِّ الۡفَلَقِ،  مِنۡ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ،  وَ مِنۡ شَرِّ غَاسِقٍ اِذَا وَقَب،  وَ مِنۡ شَرِّ النَّفّٰثٰتِ فِی الۡعُقَدِ،  وَ مِنۡ شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ اِذَا حَسَدَ [سُوۡرَةُ  النَّاس]  ۡقُلۡ اَعُوۡذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ، مَلِکِ النَّاسِ، اِلٰہِ النَّاسِ، مِنۡ شَرِّ الۡوَسۡوَاسِ الۡخَنَّاسِ، الَّذِیۡ یُوَسۡوِسُ فِیۡ صُدُوۡرِ النَّاسِ، مِنَ الۡجِنَّۃِ وَ النَّاسِ
duas.latin: [Surah Al-Falaq]Qul ‘A’udhu Bi-Rabbil-Falaq, Min Sharri Ma Khalaq, Wa Min Sharri Ghasiqin ‘Idha Waqab, Wa Min Sharri-Naffathati Fil-‘Uqadi, Wa Min Sharri Hasidin ‘Idha Hasad. [Surah An-Nas]Qul ‘A’udhu Bi-Rabbin-Nas, Malikin-Nas, Ilahin-Nas, Min-Sharril-Waswasil-Khan-Nas, Al-Ladhi Yuwas-wisu Fee Sudurin-Nas, Mina Al-Jinnati Wan-Nas.
duas.translation: [Surah Al-Falaq]Say, "I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak, From the evil of that which He created, And from the evil of darkness when it settles, And from the evil of the blowers in knots, And from the evil of an envier when he envies." [Surah An-Nas]Say, "I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind, The Sovereign of mankind, The God of mankind, From the evil of the retreating whisperer, Who whispers [evil] into the breasts of mankind, From among the jinn and mankind."
duas.benefits: Whenever Prophet (S.A.W.) became sick, he would recite these two surahs and then blow his breath over his body.

titles.title_name: For forgiveness for your parents and all Muslims

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا اغۡفِرۡ لِیۡ وَ لِوَالِدَیَّ وَ لِلۡمُؤۡمِنِیۡنَ یَوۡمَ یَقُوۡمُ الۡحِسَابُ
duas.latin: Rabbanaghfir Lee Wa Liwaalidayya Wa Lil-Mu’mineena Yawma Yaqoomul H’isaab
duas.translation: Our Lord, forgive me and my parents and the believers the Day the account is established.

duas.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ اِنِّیۡ ظَلَمۡتُ نَفۡسِیۡ فَاغۡفِرۡ لِیۡ فَغَفَرَ لَہٗ ؕ اِنَّہٗ ہُوَ الۡغَفُوۡرُ الرَّحِیۡمُ، قَالَ رَبِّ بِمَاۤ اَنۡعَمۡتَ عَلَیَّ فَلَنۡ اَکُوۡنَ ظَہِیۡرًا لِّلۡمُجۡرِمِیۡنَ، رَبِّ نَجِّنِیۡ مِنَ الۡقَوۡمِ الظّٰلِمِیۡنَ
duas.latin: Qala Rabbi innee thalamtunafsee faghfir lee faghafara lahu innahu huwa alghafooruarraheem Qala Rabbi bima anAAamtaAAalayya falan akoona thaheeran lilmujrimeen Rabbi najjinee mina alqawmi aththalimeen
duas.translation: He said, "My Lord, indeed I have wronged myself, so forgive me," and He forgave him. Indeed, He is the Forgiving, the Merciful. He said, "My Lord, for the favor You bestowed upon me, I will never be an assistant to the criminals. My Lord, save me from the wrong doing people.

duas.arabic: رَبِّ اجۡعَلۡنِیۡ مُقِیۡمَ الصَّلٰوۃِ وَ مِنۡ ذُرِّیَّتِیۡ، رَبَّنَا وَ تَقَبَّلۡ دُعَآءِ
duas.latin: Rabbij-A’lnee Muqeemas’ S’alaati Wa Min D’urrriyyatee Rabbanaa Wa Taqabbal Du-A’aa
duas.translation: O my Lord! Make me one who performs As-Salaat (Iqaamat-as-Salaat), and (also) from my offspring, our Lord! And accept my invocation.

duas.arabic: رَّبِّ ارۡحَمۡہُمَا کَمَا رَبَّیٰنِیۡ صَغِیۡرًا
duas.latin: Rabbi  irhamhuma kama rabbayani sagheera
duas.translation: My Lord, have mercy upon them (parents) as they brought me up [when i was] small.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا ہَبۡ لَنَا مِنۡ اَزۡوَاجِنَا وَ ذُرِّیّٰتِنَا قُرَّۃَ اَعۡیُنٍ وَّ اجۡعَلۡنَا لِلۡمُتَّقِیۡنَ اِمَامًا
duas.latin: Rabbana Hablana min azwaajina wadhurriy-yatina, qurrata ‘ayioni wa-jalna lil-muttaqeena Imaama
duas.translation: O my Lord! Grant unto us wives and offspring who will be the comfort of our eyes, and give us (the grace) to lead the righteous.

titles.title_name: Asking Allah to grant you a child

duas.arabic: رَبِّ ہَبۡ لِیۡ مِنۡ لَّدُنۡکَ ذُرِّیَّۃً طَیِّبَۃً ۚ اِنَّکَ سَمِیۡعُ الدُّعَآءِ
duas.latin: Rabbi Hab Lee Mil Ladunka D’urriyyatan T’ayyibah Innaka Samee-u’d Du’aa
duas.translation: O my Lord! Grant me from You, a good offspring. You are indeed the All-Hearer of invocation.
duas.benefits: Read this dua if you are having trouble having a child! Prophet Zakaria (AS) recited this dua, praying to Allah to grant him a child when he attained old age.

duas.arabic: رَبِّ لَا تَذَرۡنِیۡ فَرۡدًا وَّ اَنۡتَ خَیۡرُ الۡوٰرِثِیۡنَ
duas.latin: Rabbi Laa Tad’arnee Fardaw wa Anta Khayrul Waaritheen
duas.translation: O My Lord! Leave me not single (childless), though You are the Best of the inheritors.

titles.title_name: Say these words when in distress

duas.arabic: اللّٰہُ اللّٰہُ رَبِّي لَا أُشْرِكُ بِهِ شَيْئًا
duas.latin: Allahu Allahu Rabbi, la ushriku bihi shai'a
duas.translation: Allah, Allah is my Lord. I do not associate anything with Him.

duas.arabic: قَالَتۡ رَبِّ ابۡنِ لِیۡ عِنۡدَکَ بَیۡتًا فِی الۡجَنَّۃِ
duas.latin: Qaalat rab bibni lee 'indaka baitan fil jannati
duas.translation: My Lord! Build me a house in Paradise near You

titles.title_name: When you fail or lose at something

duas.arabic: قَدَّرَ اللّٰهُ وَمَا شَاءَ فَعَلَ
duas.latin: Qadarullaahu wa maa shaa’afa’ala
duas.translation: It is the Decree of Allah and He does whatever He wills.

duas.arabic: اِنَّا لِلّٰہِ وَ اِنَّاۤ اِلَیۡہِ رٰجِعُوۡنَ، اللَّهُمَّ أْجُرْنِي فِي مُصِيبَتِي وَأَخْلِفْ لِي خَيْرًا مِنْهَا
duas.latin: Innaa lillaahi wa ‘innaa ‘ilayhi raaji’oon, Allaahumma’-jurni fee museebatee wa ‘akhliflee khayran minhaa
duas.translation: We are from Allah and unto Him we return. O Allah take me out of my plight and bring to me after it something better.

duas.arabic: حَسۡبُنَا اللّٰہُ وَ نِعۡمَ الۡوَکِیۡلُ
duas.latin: Hasbunallaahu wa ni’amal-wakeel
duas.translation: Allah is sufficient for us and the best of those on whom to depend.

duas.arabic: حَسۡبُنَا اللّٰہُ وَ نِعۡمَ الۡوَکِیۡلُ
duas.latin: Hasbunallaahu wa ni’amal-wakeel
duas.translation: Allah is sufficient for us and the best of those on whom to depend.

duas.arabic: اِنَّمَاۤ اَشۡکُوۡا بَثِّیۡ وَ حُزۡنِیۡۤ  اِلَی اللّٰہِ وَ اَعۡلَمُ مِنَ اللّٰہِ مَا لَا تَعۡلَمُوۡنَ
duas.latin: Innama ashkoo baththee wahuzneeila Allahi waaAAlamu mina Allahi ma lataAAlamoon
duas.translation: I only complain of my suffering and my grief to Allah, and I know from Allah that which you do not know.
duas.benefits: Prophet Ya'coob (AS) used to recite this dua.

titles.title_name: At times of worry and sorry

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ وَالْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ وَالْبُخْلِ وَالْجُبْنِ وَضَلَعِ الدَّيْنِ وَغَلَبَةِ الرِّجَالِ
duas.latin: Allaahumma ‘innee ‘a’oothu bika minal-hammi walhazani, wal’ajzi walkasali, walbukhli waljubni, wa dhala’id-dayni wa ghalabatir-rijaal
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in you from grief and sadness, from weakness and from laziness, from miserliness and from cowardice, from being overcome by debt and overpowered by men (i .e . others).

duas.arabic: لَّاۤ اِلٰہَ  اِلَّاۤ اَنۡتَ سُبۡحٰنَکَ  اِنِّیۡ کُنۡتُ مِنَ الظّٰلِمِیۡنَ
duas.latin: Laa ‘ilaaha ‘illaa ‘Anta subhaanaka ‘innee kuntu minadh-dhaalimeen
duas.translation: There is none worthy of worship but You, glory is to You. Surely, I was among the wrongdoers.
duas.benefits: Prophet Yunus supplicate this Dua to Allah when he was in the belly of the whale.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَحْمَتَكَ أَرْجُو فَلاَ تَكِلْنِي إِلَى نَفْسِي طَرْفَةَ عَيْنٍ وَأَصْلِحْ لِي شَأْنِي كُلَّهُ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ
duas.latin: Allaahumma rahmataka ‘arjoo falaa takilnee ‘ilaa nafsee tarfata ‘aynin, wa ‘aslih lee sha’nee kullahu, laa’ilaaha ‘illaa ‘Anta
duas.translation: O Allah, I hope for Your mercy. Do not leave me to myself even for the blinking of an eye (i.e. a moment). Correct all of my affairs for me. There is none worthy of worship but You.

duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ الْعَظِيمُ الْحَلِيمُ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ رَبُّ السَّمَوَاتِ، وَرَبُّ الأَرْضِ، وَرَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْكَرِيمِ
duas.latin: Laa ‘ilaaha ‘illallaahul-’Adheemul-Haleem, laa ‘ilaaha ‘illallaahu Rabbul-’Arshil-’Adheem, laa ‘ilaaha ‘illallaahu Rabbus-samaawaati wa Rabbul-’ardhi wa Rabbul-’Arshil-Kareem
duas.translation: There is none worthy of worship but Allah the Mighty, the Forbearing. There is none worthy of worship but Allah, Lord of the Magnificent Throne. There is none worthy of worship but Allah, Lord of the heavens and Lord of the earth, and Lord of the Noble Throne.

duas.arabic: يَا حَىُّ يَا قَيُّومُ بِرَحْمَتِكَ أَسْتَغِيثُ، يَا ذَا الْجَلاَلِ وَالإِكْرَامِ
duas.latin: Ya hayyu ya qayyoom, birahmatika astagheeth, Ya Dhal-Jalali wal-Ikram
duas.translation: O Ever Living, O Self-Sustaining Sustainer! In Your Mercy do I seek relief, O Possessor of Majesty and Honor.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ وَالْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ وَالْبُخْلِ وَالْجُبْنِ وَضَلَعِ الدَّيْنِ وَغَلَبَةِ الرِّجَالِ
duas.latin: Allaahumma ‘innee ‘a’oothu bika minal-hammi walhazani, wal’ajzi walkasali, walbukhli waljubni, wa dhala’id-dayni wa ghalabatir-rijaal
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in you from grief and sadness, from weakness and from laziness, from miserliness and from cowardice, from being overcome by debt and overpowered by men (i .e . others).

duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلّٰهِ عَلَى كُلِّ حَالٍ
duas.latin: Alhamdu lillaahi ‘alaa kulli haal
duas.translation: Praise is to Allah in all circumstances.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَاۤ اَفۡرِغۡ عَلَیۡنَا صَبۡرًا وَّ تَوَفَّنَا مُسۡلِمِیۡنَ
duas.latin: Rabbanaaa Afrigh A’laynaa S’abraw Wa Tawaffanaa Muslimeen
duas.translation: Our Lord! pour out on us patience, and cause us to die as Muslims.

duas.arabic: رَبِّ احۡکُمۡ بِالۡحَقِّ وَ رَبُّنَا الرَّحۡمٰنُ الۡمُسۡتَعَانُ عَلٰی مَا تَصِفُوۡنَ
duas.latin: Rabbi ohkum bilhaqqi wa rabbuna arrahmanul musta’aanu alaa ma tasifoon
duas.translation: My Lord, judge [between us] in truth. And our Lord is the Most Merciful, the one whose help is sought against that which you describe.
duas.benefits: Read this dua if you are bullied at school or the workplace or are under the rule of tyrants! Prophet (SAW) recited this dua when the disbelievers mocked him and said terrible things about him.

duas.arabic: حَسۡبِیَ اللّٰہُ  لَاۤ اِلٰہَ اِلَّا ہُوَ   ؕ عَلَیۡہِ تَوَکَّلۡتُ وَ ہُوَ رَبُّ الۡعَرۡشِ الۡعَظِیۡمِ
duas.latin: Hasbiyal-lahu la ilaha illa huwa, AAalayhi tawakkalt, wahuwa rabbul-AAarshil-Aaatheem
duas.translation: Allah is Sufficient for me, none has the right to be worshipped except Him, upon Him I rely and He is Lord of the exalted throne.

duas.arabic: وَ اُفَوِّضُ اَمۡرِیۡۤ اِلَی اللّٰہِ ؕ اِنَّ اللّٰہَ بَصِیۡرٌۢ بِالۡعِبَادِ
duas.latin: wa ufawwidhu amree ila Allahi innallaha baseerun bil ibaad
duas.translation: And you will remember what I [now] say to you, and I entrust my affair to Allah . Indeed, Allah is Seeing of [His] servants.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لاَ تُؤَاخِذْنِي بِمَا يَقُولُونَ، وَاغْفِرْ لِي مَا لا يَعْلَمُونَ‏
duas.latin: Allaahumma laa tu’aakhithnee bimaa yaqooloona, waghfir lee maa laa ya’lamoon
duas.translation: O Allah, do not call me to account for what they say and forgive me for what they have no knowledge of.

duas.arabic: لَّاۤ اِلٰہَ اِلَّاۤ اللّٰہُ
duas.latin: Laa ‘ilaaha ‘illallaahu
duas.translation: There is none worthy of worship but Allah.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَاۤ اَفۡرِغۡ عَلَیۡنَا صَبۡرًا وَّ ثَبِّتۡ اَقۡدَامَنَا وَ انۡصُرۡنَا عَلَی الۡقَوۡمِ الۡکٰفِرِیۡنَ
duas.latin: Rabbana Afrigh A’layna Sabran wa Thabbit Aqdamana Wansurna A’lal Qawmil Kafireen
duas.translation: Our Lord! Bestow on us endurance, make our foothold sure, and give us help against the disbelieving folk.

duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِاللّٰهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطانِ الرَّجِيْمِ
duas.latin: A’oothu billaahi minash-Shaytaanir-rajeem
duas.translation: I seek refuge with Allah against the Satan, the outcast.

duas.arabic: اِنَّا لِلّٰہِ وَ اِنَّاۤ اِلَیۡہِ رٰجِعُوۡنَ
duas.latin: Inna lillahi wa inna ilayhi raajioon
duas.translation: Indeed we belong to Allah, and indeed to Him we will return.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي بِحَلاَلِكَ عَنْ حَرَامِكَ وَأَغْنِنِي بِفَضْلِكَ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ
duas.latin: Allaahummak-finee bihalaalika ‘an haraamika wa ‘aghninee bifadhlika ‘amman siwaaka
duas.translation: O Allah, suffice me with what You have allowed instead of what You have forbidden, and make me independent of all others besides You.

titles.title_name: For someone who lends you money

duas.arabic: بَارَكَ اللّٰهُ لَكَ فِي أَهْلِكَ وَمَالِكَ إِنَّمَا جَزَاءُ السَّلَفِ الْحَمْدُ وَالأَدَاءُ
duas.latin: Baarakallaahu laka fee ‘ahlika wa maalika, ‘innamaa jazaa’us-salafil-hamdu wal’adaa’
duas.translation: May Allah bless you in your family and your wealth, surely the reward for a loan is praise and returning (what was borrowed).

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا لَا تُزِغۡ قُلُوۡبَنَا بَعۡدَ اِذۡ ہَدَیۡتَنَا وَ ہَبۡ لَنَا مِنۡ لَّدُنۡکَ رَحۡمَۃً ۚ اِنَّکَ اَنۡتَ الۡوَہَّابُ
duas.latin: Rabbanaa Laa Tuzigh Quloobanaa Ba’-Da Id’hadaytanaa Wa Hab Lanaa Mil Ladunka Rah’mah Innaka Antal Wahaab
duas.translation: Our Lord! Let not our hearts deviate (from the truth) after You have guided us, and grant us mercy from You. Truly, You are the Bestower.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا اغۡفِرۡ لَنَا ذُنُوۡبَنَا وَ اِسۡرَافَنَا فِیۡۤ اَمۡرِنَا وَ ثَبِّتۡ اَقۡدَامَنَا وَ انۡصُرۡنَا عَلَی الۡقَوۡمِ الۡکٰفِرِیۡنَ
duas.latin: Rabbanaghfir lanaa d’unoobanaa wa israafanaa fee amrinaa wa thabbit aqdaamanaa wan s’urnaa a’lal qawmil kaafireen
duas.translation: Our Lord! Forgive us our sins and our transgressions (in keeping our duties to You), establish our feet firmly, and give us victory over the disbelieving folk.

duas.arabic: رَضِيتُ بِاللّٰهِ رَبًّا وَبِالإِسْلاَمِ دِينًا وَبِمُحَمَّدٍ نَبِيًّا
duas.latin: Radeetu billahi rabban wabil-islami deenan wabiMuhammadin nabiyya.
duas.translation: I am pleased with Allah as a Lord, and Islam as a religion and Muhammad peace be upon to him as a Prophet.

duas.arabic: اَعُوۡذُ بِاللّٰہ
duas.latin: `A’udhu billah
duas.translation: I seek refuge in Allah.

duas.arabic: آمَنْتُ بِاللّٰهِ وَرُسُلِهِ
duas.latin: Aamantu billaahi wa Rusulihi
duas.translation: I believe in Allah and His Messenger.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَاۤ اٰمَنَّا بِمَاۤ اَنۡزَلۡتَ وَ اتَّبَعۡنَا الرَّسُوۡلَ فَاکۡتُبۡنَا مَعَ الشّٰہِدِیۡنَ
duas.latin: Rabbana amanna bima anzalta wattaba ‘nar-Rusula fak-tubna ma’ash-Shahideen
duas.translation: Our Lord! We believe in what Thou hast revealed, and we follow the Messenger. Then write us down among those who bear witness.
duas.benefits: This dua was asked by the companions of Prophet Isa (AS).

titles.title_name: Seek forgiveness and strengthen your Imaan

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا لَا تُؤَاخِذۡنَاۤ اِنۡ نَّسِیۡنَاۤ اَوۡ اَخۡطَاۡنَا، رَبَّنَا وَ لَا تَحۡمِلۡ عَلَیۡنَاۤ اِصۡرًا کَمَا حَمَلۡتَہٗ عَلَی الَّذِیۡنَ مِنۡ قَبۡلِنَا، رَبَّنَا وَ لَا تُحَمِّلۡنَا مَا لَا طَاقَۃَ لَنَا بِہٖ، وَ اعۡفُ عَنَّا، وَ اغۡفِرۡ لَنَا، وَ ارۡحَمۡنَا، اَنۡتَ مَوۡلٰىنَا فَانۡصُرۡنَا عَلَی الۡقَوۡمِ الۡکٰفِرِیۡنَ
duas.latin: Rabbanaa Laa Too-Akhid’naaa In-Naseenaa Aw Akht’aanaa Rabbanaa wa Laa Tah’mil A’laynaaa Is’ran Kamaa Ha’maltahoo A’lal Lad’eena min Qablinaa Rabbanaa wa Laa Tuh’ammilnaa Maa Laa T’aaqata Lanaa Bih Wa’-Fu A’nnaa Waghfirlanaa Warh’amnaa Anta Mawlaanaa Fans’urnaa A’lal Qawmil Kaafireen
duas.translation: Our Lord! Punish us not if we forget or fall into error, our Lord! Lay not on us a burden like that which You did lay on those before us; our Lord! Put not on us a burden greater than we have strength to bear. Pardon us and grant us Forgiveness. Have mercy on us. You are our Maula (Patron, Supporter and Protector, etc.) and give us victory over the disbelieving people.

duas.arabic: اِنِّیۡ وَجَّہۡتُ وَجۡہِیَ لِلَّذِیۡ فَطَرَ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَ الۡاَرۡضَ حَنِیۡفًا وَّ مَاۤ اَنَا مِنَ الۡمُشۡرِکِیۡنَ
duas.latin: Innee wajjahtu wajhiya lillathee fataraassamawati wal-arda haneefanwama ana mina almushrikeen
duas.translation: Indeed, I have turned my face toward He who created the heavens and the earth, inclining toward truth, and I am not of those who associate others with Allah.

duas.arabic: اِنَّ صَلَاتِیۡ وَ نُسُکِیۡ وَ مَحۡیَایَ وَ مَمَاتِیۡ  لِلّٰہِ  رَبِّ الۡعٰلَمِیۡنَ لَا شَرِیۡکَ لَہٗ، وَ بِذٰلِکَ اُمِرۡتُ وَ اَنَا اَوَّلُ الۡمُسۡلِمِیۡنَ
duas.latin: inna salatee wanusukee wamahyaya wamamatee lillahi rabbil aalameen. La shareeka lahu wa bithalika omirtu wa ana aw walul muslimeen
duas.translation: Indeed, my prayer, my rites of sacrifice, my living and my dying are for Allah, Lord of the worlds. He has no partner. And of this I have been commanded, and I am the first of the Muslims.

duas.arabic: فَاطِرَ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَ الۡاَرۡضِ ۟ اَنۡتَ وَلِیّٖ فِی الدُّنۡیَا وَ الۡاٰخِرَۃِ ۚ تَوَفَّنِیۡ مُسۡلِمًا وَّ اَلۡحِقۡنِیۡ بِالصّٰلِحِیۡنَ
duas.latin: fatira assamawatiwal-ardi anta waliyyee fee addunyawal-akhirati tawaffanee musliman waalhiqneebissaliheen
duas.translation: Creator of the heavens and earth, You are my protector in this world and in the Hereafter. Cause me to die a Muslim and join me with the righteous.
duas.benefits: Read this dua for good and righteous company. Prophet Yusuf (AS) recited this dua.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَاۤ اٰمَنَّا فَاکۡتُبۡنَا مَعَ الشّٰہِدِیۡنَ
duas.latin: Rabbana aamana faktubna ma’ ash-shahideen
duas.translation: Our Lord! We believe; write us down among the witnesses.

duas.arabic: رَّبِّ زِدۡنِیۡ عِلۡمًا
duas.latin: Rabbi Zidnee I’lmaa.
duas.translation: My Lord! Increase me in knowledge.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِلْماً نَافِعاً،  وَرِزْقاً طَيِّباً،  وَعَمَلاً مُتَقَبَّلاً
duas.latin: Allaahumma ‘innee ‘as’aluka ‘ilman naafi’an, wa rizqan tayyiban, wa ‘amalan mutaqabbalan
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You for knowledge that is of benefit, a good provision, and deeds that will be accepted.

duas.arabic: رَبِّ ہَبۡ لِیۡ حُکۡمًا وَّ اَلۡحِقۡنِیۡ بِالصّٰلِحِیۡنَ، وَ اجۡعَلۡ لِّیۡ لِسَانَ صِدۡقٍ فِی الۡاٰخِرِیۡنَ، وَ اجۡعَلۡنِیۡ مِنۡ وَّرَثَۃِ جَنَّۃِ النَّعِیۡمِ، وَ اغۡفِرۡ لِاَبِیۡۤ اِنَّہٗ کَانَ مِنَ الضَّآلِّیۡنَ، وَ لَا تُخۡزِنِیۡ یَوۡمَ یُبۡعَثُوۡنَ، یَوۡمَ لَا یَنۡفَعُ مَالٌ وَّ لَا بَنُوۡنَ، اِلَّا مَنۡ اَتَی اللّٰہَ بِقَلۡبٍ سَلِیۡمٍ
duas.latin: Rabbi hab lee hukman wa alhiqnee bis saliheen. Waj’al lee lisana sidqin fil akhireen. Waj’al nee min warathati jannatin na’eem. Waghfir li-abee innahu kanamina addalleen. Wala tukhzinee yawma yub’asoon. Yawma la yanfa’u malun walaa banoon. Illa man ata Allah bi qalbin saleem.
duas.translation: My Lord! Bestow Hukman (religious knowledge, right judgement of the affairs and Prophethood) on me, and join me with the righteous. And grant me an honourable mention in later generations. And place me among the inheritors of the Garden of Pleasure. And forgive my father. Indeed, he has been of those astray. And disgrace me not on the Day when (all the creatures) will be resurrected. The Day when there will not benefit [anyone] wealth or children, But only one who comes to Allah with a sound heart.
duas.benefits: This was Prophet Ibrahim's (AS) favorite Dua

duas.arabic: رَبِّ اشۡرَحۡ لِیۡ صَدۡرِیۡ، وَ یَسِّرۡ لِیۡۤ اَمۡرِیۡ، وَ احۡلُلۡ عُقۡدَۃً  مِّنۡ لِّسَانِیۡ، یَفۡقَہُوۡا قَوۡلِیۡ
duas.latin: Rabbishrah’ Lee S’adree wa Yassir Leee Amree Wah’–Lul U’qdatam Mil Lisaanee Yafqahoo Qawlee
duas.translation: O my Lord! Open for me my chest. And ease my task for me.  And make loose the knot from my tongue, that they understand my speech.

duas.arabic: سُبۡحٰنَکَ لَا عِلۡمَ لَنَاۤ اِلَّا مَا عَلَّمۡتَنَا ؕ اِنَّکَ اَنۡتَ الۡعَلِیۡمُ الۡحَکِیۡمُ
duas.latin: Subhanaka laAAilma lana illa ma AAallamtanainnaka anta alAAaleemu alhakeem
duas.translation: Glory be to You, we have no knowledge except what you have taught us. Verily, it is You, the All-Knower, the All-Wise.

duas.arabic: اَعُوۡذُ بِاللّٰہِ اَنۡ اَکُوۡنَ مِنَ الۡجٰہِلِیۡنَ
duas.latin: Aoothu billahi an akoona minal jahileen
duas.translation: I seek refuge in Allah from being among the ignorant.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ أَنْ أَضِلَّ أَوْ أُضَلَّ أَوْ أَزِلَّ أَوْ أُزَلَّ أَوْ أَظْلِمَ أَوْ أُظْلَمَ أَوْ أَجْهَلَ أَوْ يُجْهَلَ عَلَىَّ
duas.latin: Allahumma innee aAAoothu bika an adilla aw odal, aw azilla aw ozall, aw athlima aw othlam, aw ajhala aw yujhala AAalay.
duas.translation: O Allah, I take refuge with You lest I should stray or be led astray, or slip or be tripped, or oppress or be oppressed, or behave foolishly or be treated foolishly.’ slip: i.e. to commit a sin unintentionally

titles.title_name: Seek forgiveness and protection from hell

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَاۤ اِنَّنَاۤ اٰمَنَّا فَاغۡفِرۡ لَنَا ذُنُوۡبَنَا وَ قِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
duas.latin: Rabbana innana amanna faghfir lana dhunuubana wa qinna ‘adhaban-Naar
duas.translation: Our Lord! We have indeed believed, so forgive us our sins and save us from the punishment of the Fire.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا وَسِعۡتَ کُلَّ شَیۡءٍ رَّحۡمَۃً وَّ عِلۡمًا فَاغۡفِرۡ لِلَّذِیۡنَ تَابُوۡا وَ اتَّبَعُوۡا سَبِیۡلَکَ وَ قِہِمۡ عَذَابَ الۡجَحِیۡمِ
duas.latin: Rabbana wasi’ta kulla sha’ir Rahmatanw wa ‘ilman faghfir lilladhina tabu wattaba’u sabilaka waqihim ‘adhabal-Jahiim
duas.translation: Our Lord, You have encompassed all things in mercy and knowledge, so forgive those who have repented and followed Your way and protect them from the punishment of Hellfire.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا مَا خَلَقۡتَ ہٰذَا بَاطِلًا ۚ سُبۡحٰنَکَ فَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ، رَبَّنَاۤ اِنَّکَ مَنۡ تُدۡخِلِ النَّارَ فَقَدۡ اَخۡزَیۡتَہٗ، وَ مَا لِلظّٰلِمِیۡنَ مِنۡ اَنۡصَارٍ، رَبَّنَاۤ اِنَّنَا سَمِعۡنَا مُنَادِیًا یُّنَادِیۡ لِلۡاِیۡمَانِ اَنۡ اٰمِنُوۡا بِرَبِّکُمۡ فَاٰمَنَّا ٭ۖ رَبَّنَا فَاغۡفِرۡ لَنَا ذُنُوۡبَنَا وَ کَفِّرۡ عَنَّا سَیِّاٰتِنَا وَ تَوَفَّنَا مَعَ الۡاَبۡرَارِ، رَبَّنَا وَ اٰتِنَا مَا وَعَدۡتَّنَا عَلٰی رُسُلِکَ وَ لَا تُخۡزِنَا یَوۡمَ الۡقِیٰمَۃِ، اِنَّکَ لَا تُخۡلِفُ الۡمِیۡعَادَ
duas.latin: Rabbana ma khalaqta hadha batila Subhanaka faqina ‘adhaban-Naar. Rabbana innaka man tudkhilin nara faqad akhzaytah wa ma liDh-dhalimeena min ansar. Rabbanaa Innanaa Sami’-Naa Munaadiyay Yunaadee Lil – Eemaani An Aaminoo Birabbikum Fa- Aamannaa Rabbanaa Faghfir Lanaa D’unoobanaa Wa Kaffir A’nnaaa Sayyi- Aatinaa Wa Tawaffanaa Ma-A’l Abraaar. Rabbanaa Wa Aatinaa Maa Wa-A’ttanaa A’laa Rusulika Wa Laa Tukhzinaa Yawal Qiyaamah Innak Laa Tukhliful Mee’a’ad.
duas.translation: Our Lord! You have not created (all) this without purpose, glory to You! (Exalted be You above all that they associate with You as partners). Give us salvation from the torment of the Fire. *Our Lord! Verily, whom You admit to the Fire, indeed, You have disgraced him, and never will the Zaalimoon (polytheists and wrong-doers) find any helpers. *Our Lord! Verily, we have heard the call of one (Muhammad p.b.u.h.) calling to Faith: ‘Believe in your Lord,’ and we have believed. *Our Lord! Forgive us our sins and remit from us our evil deeds, and make us die in the state of righteousness along with Al-Abraar (those who are obedient to Allah and follow strictly His Orders). *Our Lord! Grant us what You promised unto us through Your Messengers and disgrace us not on the Day of Resurrection, for You never break (Your) Promise.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا اصۡرِفۡ عَنَّا عَذَابَ جَہَنَّمَ ٭ۖ اِنَّ عَذَابَہَا کَانَ غَرَامًا، اِنَّہَا سَآءَتۡ مُسۡتَقَرًّا وَّ مُقَامًا
duas.latin: Rabbanas-rif ‘anna ‘adhaba jahannama inna ‘adhabaha kana gharama innaha sa’at musta-qarranw wa muqama
duas.translation: Our Lord! Avert from us the Wrath of Hell, for its Wrath is indeed an affliction grievous,- Evil indeed is it as an abode, and as a place to rest in.

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا وَ اَدۡخِلۡہُمۡ جَنّٰتِ عَدۡنِۣ الَّتِیۡ وَعَدۡتَّہُمۡ وَ مَنۡ صَلَحَ مِنۡ اٰبَآئِہِمۡ وَ اَزۡوَاجِہِمۡ وَ ذُرِّیّٰتِہِمۡ، اِنَّکَ اَنۡتَ الۡعَزِیۡزُ الۡحَکِیۡمُ وَ قِہِمُ السَّیِّاٰتِ وَ مَنۡ تَقِ السَّیِّاٰتِ یَوۡمَئِذٍ فَقَدۡ رَحِمۡتَہٗ وَ ذٰلِکَ ہُوَ الۡفَوۡزُ الۡعَظِیۡمُ
duas.latin: Rabbana wa adhkhilhum Jannati ‘adninil-lati wa’attahum wa man salaha min aba’ihim wa azwajihim wa dhuriyyatihim innaka antal ‘Azizul-Hakim, waqihimus sayyi’at wa man taqis-sayyi’ati yawma’idhin faqad rahimatahu wa dhalika huwal fawzul-’Adheem
duas.translation: Our Lord! And make them enter the ‘Adn (Eden) Paradise (everlasting Gardens) which you have promised them, and to the righteous among their fathers, their wives, and their offspring! Verily, You are the All-Mighty, the All-Wise. And save them from (the punishment, because of what they did of) the sins, and whomsoever You save from (the punishment, because of what they did of) the sins (i.e. excuse them) that Day, him verily, You have taken into mercy.’ And that is the supreme success.’

duas.arabic: لَبَّيْكَ اللَّهُمَّ لَبَّيْكَ، لَبَّيْكَ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَكَ لَبَّيْكَ، إِنَّ الْحَمْدَ وَالنِّعْمَةَ لَكَ وَالْمُلْكَ، لاَ شَرِيكَ لَكَ
duas.latin: Labbayk Allaahumma labbayk, labbayk laa shareeka laka labbayk, ‘innal-hamda, wanni’mata, laka walmulk, laa shareeka laka.
duas.translation: Ever at Your service, O Allah, every at Your service. Ever at Your Service, You have no partner, ever at Your service. Verily all praise, blessings and dominions are Yours. You have no partner.

titles.title_name: Takbeer when passing the black stone

duas.arabic: اَللّٰہُ اَکۡبَرُ
duas.latin: Allahu Akbar
duas.translation: Allah is the Most Great!
duas.benefits: Say Takbeer every time you pass the Black Stone. The Prophet (SAW) performed At-Tawaaf riding a camel. Every time he passed the corner (containing the Black Stone), he would point to it with something that he was holding and say Allahu Akbar.

titles.title_name: Upon reaching the Yemeni corner during Tawaf

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَاۤ اٰتِنَا فِی الدُّنۡیَا حَسَنَۃً وَّ فِی الۡاٰخِرَۃِ حَسَنَۃً وَّ قِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
duas.latin: Rabbanaaa Aatinaa Fiddunyaa H’asanah Wa Fil Aakhirati H’asanah Wa Qinaa A’d’aaban Naar
duas.translation: Our Lord! Give us in this world that which is good and in the Hereafter that which is good, and save us from the torment of the Fire!
duas.benefits: Messenger of Allah (S.A.W.) used to say between the two corners (between Yemani Corner and Black Stone) of Kaaba during Tawaf.

titles.title_name: When at Mount Safa and Mount Marwah

duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كَلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ أَنْجَزَ وَعْدَهُ وَنَصَرَ عَبْدَهُ وَهَزَمَ الأَحْزَابَ وَحْدَهُ
duas.latin: laa ilaaha ill-allaahu waḥdahu laa shareeka lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-ḥamdu wa huwa ‛alaa kulli shay’in qadeer, laa ilaaha ill-allaahu waḥdahu, anjaza wa‛dahu, wa naṣara ‛abdahu, wa hazam-al-’aḥzaaba waḥdah
duas.translation: None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without partner. To Him belongs all sovereignty and praise and He is over all things omnipotent. None has the right to be worshipped except Allah alone. He fulfilled His promise, aided His Servant and single-handedly defeated the allies.
duas.benefits: Recite this at Mount Safa and Mount Marwah. Whenever the Prophet (SAW) approached Mount Safa, he would recite: Innas-Safaa wal-Marwata ... Then he started to climb Mount Safa until he could see the House. He then faced the Qiblah repeating these words: Laa 'ilaaha 'illallaah, Allaahu 'Akbar Then he said: Laa 'ilaaha 'illallaahu wahdahu ... And then he would ask Allah for what he liked, repeating the same thing like this three times. He did this at Mount Marwah as well.

duas.arabic: اَللّٰہُ اَکۡبَرُ، اَللّٰہُ اَحَدٌ، لَّاۤ اِلٰہَ اِلَّاۤ اللّٰہُ
duas.latin: Allaahu ‘Akbar, Allaahu ‘Ahad, Laa ‘ilaaha ‘illallaah
duas.translation: Allah is the Most Great. Allah is One. There is none worthy of worship but Allah.
duas.benefits: Recite this once you reach Al-Mash'ar Al-Haraam (Muzdalifah). The Prophet (SAW) rode his camel, Al-Qaswa', until he reached the sacred area (Al-Mash'ar Al-Haraam). Then he faced the Qiblah and invoked Allah, and repeatedly said these words!

duas.arabic: اَللّٰہُ اَکۡبَرُ
duas.latin: Allahu Akbar
duas.translation: Allah is the Most Great!
duas.benefits: Recite this Dua when throwing stones at Satan during Hajj! Every time the Prophet (SAW) threw stone at any of the jamaraat, he would say Allahu Akbar. On the completion of first & second Jamaraat, he went forward, stood facing the Qiblah, raised his hands and made duas.

duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللّٰهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
duas.latin: Laa ilaaha ill-allaahu, waḥdahu laa shareeka lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-ḥamdu, wa huwa ‛alaa kulli shay’in qadeer
duas.translation: None has the right to be worshiped except Allah, alone, without partner. To Him belongs sovereignty and all praise and He is over all things omnipotent.
duas.benefits: Recite this dua at Arafat. The Prophet (SAW) said: The best of duas id the dua on the Day of Arafat and the best that anyone can say is what I and the Prophets before me have said

duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللّٰہِ، اَللّٰہُ اَکۡبَرُ
duas.latin: Bismillaahi, Allaahu ‘Akbar
duas.translation: With the Name of Allah, Allah is the Most Great

duas.arabic: اِنَّ الصَّفَا وَ الۡمَرۡوَۃَ مِنۡ شَعَآئِرِ اللّٰہِ
duas.latin: Inna alssafa waalmarwata min shaAAairi Allah
duas.translation: Indeed, as-Safa and al-Marwah are among the symbols of Allah.

titles.title_name: On the sighting of the crescent moon

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَهْلِلْهُ عَلَيْنَا بِالْيُمْنِ وَالإِيمَانِ وَالسَّلاَمَةِ وَالإِسْلاَمِ رَبِّي وَرَبُّكَ اللّٰهُ
duas.latin: Allahumma ahlilhu `alaina bil-yumni wal-iman, wassalamati wal-Islam, rabbi wa rabbuk Allah
duas.translation: O Allah, bring it over us with blessing and faith, and security and Islam. My Lord and your Lord is Allah

titles.title_name: For the night of destiny (Lailatul Qadr)

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّكَ عَفُوٌّ كَرِيمٌ تُحِبُّ الْعَفْوَ فَاعْفُ عَنِّي
duas.latin: Allahumma innaka Afuwwun [Karimun ] tuhibbul `afwa fa`fu `annee
duas.translation: O Allah, indeed You are Pardoning, [Generous,] You love pardon, so pardon me
duas.benefits: Recite this Dua on Laylatul Qadr! Aisha, may Allah be pleased with her, said: I asked the Messenger of Allah: 'O Messenger of Allah, if I know what night is the night of Qadr, what should I say during it?' Prophet (PBUH) recited this dua.

duas.arabic: إِنَّ لِلّٰهِ مَا أَخَذَ وَلَهُ مَا أَعْطَى وَكُلُّ شَىْءٍ عِنْدَ اللّٰهِ بِأَجَلٍ مُسَمًّى فَلْتَصْبِرْ وَلْتَحْتَسِبْ
duas.latin: Inna lillaahi maa ‘akhatha, wa lahu maa ‘a’taa, wa kullu shay’in ‘inda’llahi bi’ajalin musamman. Faltasbir waltahtasib
duas.translation: Surely, Allah takes what is His, and what He gives is His, and to all things He has appointed a time. So, have patience and be rewarded.

titles.title_name: When closing the eyes of the deceased

duas.arabic: اللَّهمَّ اغْفِرْ لِفُلانٍ (باسْمِهِ)، وارْفَعْ دَرَجَتهُ فِي الـمَهْدِيِّيْنَ، واخْلُفْهُ فِي عَقِبِهِ فِي الغَابِريْنَ، واغْفِرْ لَـنَا ولَهُ يَا رَبَّ العَالَـمِيْنَ، وافْسَحْ لَهُ فِي قَبْرِهِ وَنَوِّرْ لَهُ فِيْهِ
duas.latin: Allaahummaghfir li (name of the deceased person) warfa’ darajatahu fil-mahdiyyeena, wakhlufhu fee ‘aqibihi fil-ghaabireena, waghfir-lanaa wa lahu yaa Rabbal-’aalameena, wafsah lahu fee qabrihi wa nawwir lahu feehi
duas.translation: O Allah, forgive [name of the deceased person] and elevate his station among those who are guided. Send him along the path of those who came before, and forgive us and him, O Lord of the worlds. Enlarge for him his grave and shed light upon him in it.

titles.title_name: For the deceased at the funeral prayer

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لَهُ وَارْحَمْهُ وَعَافِهِ وَاعْفُ عَنْهُ وَأَكْرِمْ نُزُلَهُ وَوَسِّعْ مُدْخَلَهُ وَاغْسِلْهُ بِالْمَاءِ وَالثَّلْجِ وَالْبَرَدِ وَنَقِّهِ مِنَ الْخَطَايَا كَمَا نَقَّيْتَ الثَّوْبَ الأَبْيَضَ مِنَ الدَّنَسِ وَأَبْدِلْهُ دَارًا خَيْرًا مِنْ دَارِهِ وَأَهْلاً خَيْرًا مِنْ أَهْلِهِ وَزَوْجًا خَيْرًا مِنْ زَوْجِهِ وَأَدْخِلْهُ الْجَنَّةَ وَأَعِذْهُ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ أَوْ مِنْ عَذَابِ النَّارِ
duas.latin: Allaahum-maghfir lahu warhamhu, wa ‘aafihi, wa’fu ‘anhu, wa ‘akrim nuzulahu, wa wassi’ mudkhalahu, waghsilhu bilmaa’i waththalji walbaradi, wa naqqihi minal-khataayaa kamaa naqqaytath-thawbal-’abyadha minad-danasi, wa ‘abdilhu daaran khayran min daarihi, wa ‘ahlan khayran min ‘ahlihi, wa zawjan khayran min zawjihi, wa ‘adkhilhul-jannata, wa. ‘a’ithhu min ‘athaabil-qabri[wa ‘athaabin-naar]
duas.translation: O Allah, forgive him and have mercy on him and give him strength and pardon him. Be generous to him and cause his entrance to be wide and wash him with water and snow and hail. Cleanse him of his transgressions as white cloth is cleansed of stains. Give him an abode better than his home, and a family better than his family and a wife better than his wife. Take him into Paradise and protect him from the punishment of the grave [and from the punishment of Hell-fire].

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِحَيِّنَا وَمَيِّتِنَا وَشَاهِدِنَا وَغَائِبِنَا وَصَغِيرِنَا وَكَبِيرِنَا وَذَكَرِنَا وَأُنْثَانَا اللَّهُمَّ مَنْ أَحْيَيْتَهُ مِنَّا فَأَحْيِهِ عَلَى الإِسْلاَمِ وَمَنْ تَوَفَّيْتَهُ مِنَّا فَتَوَفَّهُ عَلَى الإِيمَانِ اللَّهُمَّ لاَ تَحْرِمْنَا أَجْرَهُ وَلاَ تُضِلَّنَا بَعْدَهُ
duas.latin: Allaahum-maghfir lihayyinaa, wa mayyitinaa, wa shaahidinaa, wa ghaa’ibinaa, wa sagheerinaa wa kabeerinaa, wa thakarinaa wa ‘unthaanaa. Allaahumma man ‘ahyaytahu minnaa fa’ahyihi ‘alal-’Islaami, wa man tawaffaytahu minnaa fatawaffahu ‘alal-’eemaani, Allaahumma laa tahrimnaa ‘ajrahu wa laa tudhillanaa ba’dahu
duas.translation: O Allah forgive our living and our dead, those who are with us and those who are absent, our young and our old, our menfolk and our womenfolk. O Allah, whomever you give life from among us give him life in Islam, and whomever you take way from us take him away in Faith. O Allah, do not forbid us their reward and do not send us astray after them.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّ {فُلاَنَ بْنَ فُلاَنٍ} فِي ذِمَّتِكَ وَحَبْلِ جِوَارِكَ فَقِهِ مِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْقَبْرِ وَعَذَابِ النَّارِ وَأَنْتَ أَهْلُ الْوَفَاءِ وَالْحَقِّ فَاغْفِرْ لَهُ وَارْحَمْهُ إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْغَفُورُ الرَّحِيمُ
duas.latin: Allaahumma ‘inna [name the person] fee thimmatika, wa habli jiwaarika, faqihi min fitnatil-qabri wa ‘athaabin-naari, wa ‘Anta ‘ahlul-wafaa’i walhaqqi. Faghfir lahu warhaw.hu ‘innaka ‘Antal-Ghafoorur-Raheem
duas.translation: O Allah, surely [name the person] is under Your protection, and in the rope of Your security, so save him from the trial of the grave and from the punishment of the Fire. You fulfill promises and grant rights, so forgive him and have mercy on him. Surely You are Most Forgiving, Most Merciful.

titles.title_name: When placing the deceased in the grave

duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللّٰهِ وَعَلَى سُنَّةِ رَسُولِ اللّٰهِ
duas.latin: Bismillaahi wa ‘alaa sunnati Rasoolillaahi
duas.translation: With the Name of Allah and according to the Sunnah of the Messenger of Allah

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اسْقِنَا غَيْثًا مُغِيثًا مَرِيئًا مَرِيعاً نَافِعًا غَيْرَ ضَارٍّ عَاجِلاً غَيْرَ آجِلٍ
duas.latin: Allaahumma ‘asqinaa ghaythan mugheethan maree’an muree’an, naafi’an ghayra dhaarrin, ‘aajilan ghayra ‘aajilin.
duas.translation: O Allah! give us rain which will replenish us, abundant, fertilising and profitable, not injurious, granting it now without delayd not delayed.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْهُ صَيِّبًا نَافِعًا
duas.latin: Allahummaj’alhu Sayyiban nafi`a
duas.translation: O Allah, make it beneficial rain.

duas.arabic: مُطِرْنَا بِفَضْلِ اللّٰهِ وَرَحْمَتِهِ
duas.latin: Mutirnaa bifadhlillaahi wa rahmatihi.
duas.translation: We have been given rain by the grace and mercy of Allah.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ حَوَالَيْنَا وَلاَ عَلَيْنَا، اللَّهُمَّ عَلَى الآكَامِ وَالظِّرَابِ وَبُطُونِ الأَوْدِيَةِ وَمَنَابِتِ الشَّجَر
duas.latin: Allaahumma hawaalaynaa wa laa ‘alaynaa. Allaahumma ‘alal-’aakaami wadh-dhiraabi, wa butoonil-’awdiyati, wa manaabitish-shajari
duas.translation: O Allah, let it pass us and not fall upon us, but upon the hills and mountains, and the center of the valleys, and upon the forested lands.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَا تَقْتُلْنَا بِغَضَبِكَ وَلَا تُهْلِكْنَا بِعَذَابِكَ وَعَافِنَا قَبْلَ ذَلِكَ
duas.latin: Allahumma la taqtulna bi-ghadabika wa la tuhlikna bi-`adhabika wa `afina qabla dhalik
duas.translation: O Allah, do not kill us with Your wrath, and do not destroy us with Your punishment, and pardon us before that.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ خَيْرِهَا وَخَيْرِ مَا فِيهَا وَخَيْرِ مَا أُرْسِلَتْ بِهِ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّهَا وَشَرِّ مَا فِيهَا وَشَرِّ مَا أُرْسِلَتْ بِهِ
duas.latin: Allahumma inniias’aluka min khairiha wa khairi ma fiha, wa khairi ma ursilat bihi, wa aaudhu bika min sharriha wa sharri ma fiha, wa sharri ma ursilat bih
duas.translation: O Allah, indeed, I ask You for its good, the good of what is in it, and the good of what it has been sent with. And I seek refuge in You from its evil, the evil of what is in it, and the evil of what it has been sent with.

duas.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ وَرَحْمَةُ اللّٰهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ
duas.latin: Assalamu ‘alaikum wa rahmatullahi wa barakatuh
duas.translation: May the peace, mercy, and blessings of Allah be upon you

duas.arabic: وَعَلَيْكُمُ السَّلاَمُ وَرَحْمَةُ اللّٰهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ
duas.latin: Wa’alaikum assalam wa rahmatullahi wa barakatuh
duas.translation: Peace and mercy and blessings of Allah be upon you

duas.arabic: جَزَاكَ اللّٰهُ خَيْرًا
duas.latin: Jazaakallaahu khayran
duas.translation: May Allah reward you with good.

duas.arabic: اَلۡحَمۡدُ لِلّٰہِ
duas.latin: Alhamdu lillaahi
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah.

duas.arabic: يَرْحَمُكَ اللّٰهُ
duas.latin: Yar hamu kal-laahu.
duas.translation: May Allah have mercy upon you

duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللّٰهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ يُحْيِي وَيُمِيتُ وَهُوَ حَيٌّ لَا يَمُوتُ بِيَدِهِ الْخَيْرُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٍ
duas.latin: Laa ilaaha illallaahu wahdahu laa shareeka lahu, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu, yuhyee wa yumeetu, wa Huwa hayyun laa yamootu, biyadihil-khayru, wa Huwa alaa kulli shayin Qadeer.
duas.translation: There is no Lord except Allah. He is One and has no partners. His is the Kingdom and for Him are all praises. He gives life and gives death. He is eternal and everlasting In His control is goodness, and He has power over everything.

titles.title_name: At the end of a Gathering/Majlis

duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ وَبِحَمْدِكَ أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ أَسْتَغْفِرُكَ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْكَ
duas.latin: Subhaanaka Allaahumma wa bihamdika, ‘ash-hadu ‘an laa ‘ilaaha ‘illaa ‘Anta, ‘astaghfiruka wa ‘atoobu ‘ilayka
duas.translation: Glory is to You, O Allah, and praise is to You. I bear witness that there is none worthy of worship but You. I seek Your forgiveness and repent to You.
duas.benefits: Whosoever recites the following dua after sitting in a gathering will be forgiven for whatever wrongs were done by him in that gathering

duas.arabic: يَهْدِيكُمُ اللّٰهُ وَيُصْلِحُ بَالَكُمْ
duas.latin: Yahdeekumul-lahu wayuslihu balakum
duas.translation: May Allah guide you and set right your affairs.

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْتَخِيرُكَ بِعِلْمِكَ وَأَسْتَقْدِرُكَ بِقُدْرَتِكَ،  وَأَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ الْعَظِيمِ،  فَإِنَّكَ تَقْدِرُ وَلاَ أَقْدِرُ وَتَعْلَمُ وَلاَ أَعْلَمُ وَأَنْتَ عَلاَّمُ الْغُيُوبِ،  اللَّهُمَّ إِنْ كُنْتَ تَعْلَمُ أَنَّ هَذَا الأَمْرَ خَيْرٌ لِي فِي دِينِي وَمَعَاشِي وَعَاقِبَةِ أَمْرِي ـ  أَوْ قَالَ عَاجِلِ أَمْرِي وَآجِلِهِ ـ  فَاقْدُرْهُ لِي وَيَسِّرْهُ لِي ثُمَّ بَارِكْ لِي فِيهِ،  وَإِنْ كُنْتَ تَعْلَمُ أَنَّ هَذَا الأَمْرَ شَرٌّ لِي فِي دِينِي وَمَعَاشِي وَعَاقِبَةِ أَمْرِي ـ  أَوْ قَالَ فِي عَاجِلِ أَمْرِي وَآجِلِهِ ـ  فَاصْرِفْهُ عَنِّي وَاصْرِفْنِي عَنْهُ،  وَاقْدُرْ لِي الْخَيْرَ حَيْثُ كَانَ ثُمَّ أَرْضِنِي بِهِ
duas.latin: Allaahumma 'innee 'astakheeruka bi'ilmika, wa 'astaqdiruka biqudratika, wa 'as'aluka min fadhtikal-'Adheemi, fa'innaka taqdiru wa laa 'aqdiru, wa ta'lamu, wa laa 'a'lamu, wa 'Anta 'Allaamul-Ghuyoobi, Allaahumma 'in kunta ta'lamu 'anna haathal-'amra-[then mention the thing to be decided] Khayrun lee fee deenee wa ma'aashee wa 'aaqibati 'amree - [or say] 'Aajilihi wa 'aajilihi - Faqdurhu lee wa yassirhu lee thumma baarik lee feehi, wa 'in kunta ta'lamu 'anna haathal-'amra sharrun lee fee deenee wa ma'aashee wa 'aaqibati 'amree - [or say] 'Aajilihi wa 'aajilihi - Fasrifhu 'annee wasrifnee 'anhu waqdur liyal-khayra haythu kaana thumma 'ardhinee bihi
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek the counsel of Your Knowledge, and I seek the help of Your Omnipotence, and I beseech You for Your Magnificent Grace. Surely, You are Capable and I am not. You know and I know not, and You are the Knower of the unseen. O Allah, if You know that this matter [then mention the thing to be decided] is good for me in my religion and in my life and for my welfare in the life to come, - [or say: in this life and the afterlife] - then ordain it for me and make it easy for me, then bless me in it. And if You know that this matter is bad for me in my religion and in my life and for my welfare in the life to come, - [or say: in this life and the afterlife] - then distance it from me, and distance me from it, and ordain for me what is good wherever it may be, and help me to be content with it. Whoever seeks the counsel of the Creator will not regret it and whoever seeks the advice of the believers will feel confident about his decisions. Allah said in the Qur’an: ‘And consult them in the affair. Then when you have taken a decision, put your trust in Allah.’
duas.benefits: Prophet (S.A.W.) said, "If anyone of you thinks of doing any job, he should offer a two rak`at prayer other than the compulsory ones and say this dua (after the prayer)."

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا افۡتَحۡ بَیۡنَنَا وَ بَیۡنَ قَوۡمِنَا بِالۡحَقِّ وَ اَنۡتَ خَیۡرُ الۡفٰتِحِیۡنَ
duas.latin: Rabbanaf-tah baynana wa bayna qawmina bil haqqi wa anta Khayrul Fatiheen
duas.translation: Our Lord! Decide Thou between us and our people in truth, for Thou art the best to decide.

duas.arabic: اَلۡحَمۡدُ لِلّٰہِ الَّذِیۡ ہَدٰىنَا لِہٰذَا ۟ وَ مَا کُنَّا لِنَہۡتَدِیَ لَوۡ لَاۤ اَنۡ ہَدٰىنَا اللّٰہُ
duas.latin: Alhamdu lillahi allathee hadaana lihatha wama kunna linahtadiya lawlaa an hadaana Allahu
duas.translation: Praise to Allah, who has guided us to this; and we would never have been guided if Allah had not guided us.
duas.benefits: The people in paradise will ask this dua after they have attained paradise.

duas.arabic: فَاللّٰہُ خَیۡرٌ حٰفِظًا وَّ ہُوَ اَرۡحَمُ الرّٰحِمِیۡنَ
duas.latin: fallahu khayrun hafithan wahuwa arhamu arrahimeen
duas.translation: Allah is the best guardian, and He is the most merciful of the merciful.
duas.benefits: This dua was asked by Prophet Ya'coob (AS). Recite this dua to seek guidance from Allah SWT.
